1Chronicles2:1 Izrel mụrụ ụmụ ndị ikom ndị a: Ruben, Simiọn, Livayị, Juda, Isaka, na Zebụlọn," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Josef, Benjamin, Naftalị, Gad na Asha." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda mụtara ụmụ ndị ikom atọ site na nwunye ya Bat-shua, onye Kenan. Aha ha bụ Ịa, Onan na Shela. Ma Ịa ọkpara Juda bụ nnọọ mmadụ ọjọọ nʼihu Onyenwe anyị, nʼihi ya, Onyenwe anyị gburu ya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Juda mụtakwara ụmụ nwoke abụọ ọzọ, Perez na Zera, site na Tama nwunye nwa ya nwoke. Ụmụ ndị nwoke niile Juda dị ise." 
1Chronicles2:5 Ụmụ ndị ikom Perez bụ, Hezrọn na Hamul." 
1Chronicles2:6 Zera mụrụ: Zimri, na Etan, na Heman, na Kalkol, na Dara. Ha dị ndị ikom ise nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ekan nwa Kami, bụ onye ahụ tinyere ndị Izrel na nsogbu, site nʼihe o mere nke gbasara ihe e doro nsọ." 
1Chronicles2:8 Etan mụrụ Azaraya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezrọn mụtara Jerameel, Ram na Kaleb." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ram mụrụ Aminadab, Aminadab amụọ Nashọn onyendu a maara ama na Juda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashọn mụrụ Salma, Salma amụọ Boaz." 
1Chronicles2:12 Boaz amụta Obed, Obed amụọ Jesi." 
1Chronicles2:13 Nwa nwoke mbụ Jesi mụrụ bụ Eliab; nke abụọ bụ Abinadab, nke atọ bụ Shimea." 
1Chronicles2:14 Nke anọ bụ Netanel, nke ise bụ Radai," 
1Chronicles2:15 nke isii Ozem, nke asaa Devid." 
1Chronicles2:16 Ọ mụkwara ụmụ nwanyị abụọ site nʼaka nwunye ya, ndị aha ha bụ Zeruaya na Abigel. Zeruaya mụrụ Abishai, na Joab, na Asahel." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigel, nwunye Jeta onye Ishmel mụrụ Amasa." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kaleb nwa Hezrọn lụrụ ụmụ nwanyị abụọ, Azuba na Jeriọt. Ọ mụrụ ụmụ ndị ikom ndị a Jesha, Shobab na Adọn." 
1Chronicles2:19 Mgbe Azuba nwụrụ, Kaleb lụrụ nwunye ọzọ. Aha ya bụ Efrat, onye mụtaara ya Hua." 
1Chronicles2:20 Hua mụrụ Uri, Uri mụtara Bezalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Mgbe Hezrọn gbara iri afọ isii, ọ lụrụ ada Makia onye mụtaara ya Segub. Makia bụ nna Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segub mụrụ Jaịa, onye chịrị iri obodo abụọ na atọ na Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ma Geshua na Aram dọtara obodo Jaịa nʼagha, dọtakwa Kenat nʼagha, ya na iri obodo nta isii ndị ọzọ gbara ya gburugburu. Ndị a niile bụ ụmụ Makia nna Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:24 Mgbe Hezrọn nwụrụ nʼobodo Kaleb Efrata, Abija nwunye Hezrọn mụtaara ya Ashua, onye bụ nna Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Jerameel ọkpara Hezrọn mụtara Ram, onye bụ ọkpara ya, mụọkwa Buna, na Oren, na Ozem, na Ahija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Nwunye Jerameel nke abụọ, aha ya bụ Atara, mụtara Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ram ọkpara Jerameel mụtara ụmụ ndị ikom ndị a: Maaz, na Jamin, na Eka." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ụmụ Onam mụrụ bụ Shamai, na Jada. Shamai mụkwara Nadab, na Abishua." 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishua na nwunye ya Abihail mụrụ Aban, na Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ụmụ Nadab mụrụ bụ Seled, na Apaim. Seled nwụrụ na-amụtaghị nwa ọbụla." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ma Apaim mụtara Ishi. Ishi mụrụ Sheshan, Sheshan amụtakwa Alai." 
1Chronicles2:32 Jada nwanne Shamai mụtara ụmụ ndị ikom abụọ, Jeta na Jonatan. Jeta amụtaghị nwa ọbụla," 
1Chronicles2:33 ma Jonatan mụtara ụmụ ndị ikom abụọ: Pelet na Zaza. Ndị a bụ ụmụ Jerameel. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshan mụtara ọtụtụ ụmụ nwanyị, ma o nweghị nwa nwoke. O nwere otu ohu bụ onye Ijipt, aha ya bụ Jaha." 
1Chronicles2:35 O weere ada ya nwanyị nye odibo ya bụ Jaha, ka ọ bụrụ nwunye ya. Ọ mụtara ya otu nwa nwoke aha ya bụ Atai." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai mụrụ Netan, Netan mụrụ Zabad," 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabad amụọ Eflal. Nwa Eflal bụ Obed," 
1Chronicles2:38 ma Obed mụrụ Jehu. Jehu amụọ Azaraya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaraya bụ nna Helez, Helez mụrụ Eleasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa mụrụ Sismai, Sismai amụọ Shalum." 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalum bụ nna Jekamaya, ebe Jekamaya mụrụ Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ụmụ ndị ikom Kaleb nwanne Jerameel bụ Mesha onye bụ ọkpara ya, nna Zif, onye mụrụ Maresha nna Hebrọn." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebrọn mụrụ ndị a: Kora, Tapụọa, Rekem na Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema mụrụ Raham, onye bụ nna Jokean. Rekem mụrụ Shamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ọkpara Shamai bụ Maon, onye mụrụ Bet Zoa." 
1Chronicles2:46 Efaa, iko nwanyị Kaleb, mụtaara ya Haran, Moza na Gazez. Haran mụtakwara nwa ọ kpọrọ aha ya Gazez." 
1Chronicles2:47 Jadia mụtara ndị ikom ndị a: Regem, Jotam, Gesham, Pelet, Efaa na Shaaf." 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka, iko nwanyị ọzọ Kaleb nwere mụtaara ya ndị a: Sheba na Tiahana," 
1Chronicles2:49 ọ mụtakwara Shaaf, onye bụ nna Madmanna, Sheva nna Makbena, tinyere Gibea. Aha nwa nwanyị Kaleb mụtara bụ Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ndị a bụ ụmụ Kaleb. Ụmụ Hua, ọkpara Efrata mụrụ bụ, Shobal, nna Kiriat Jearim," 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma nna Betlehem, na Haref, nna Bet-Gadea."

1Chronicles2:53 Ya mụtakwara ndị ikwu Kiriat Jearim, ndị Itra, ndị Put, ndị Shumat na ndị Mishra. Nʼime ndị a ka ndị Zorat na ndị Eshtaol si pụta." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma mụtara ikwu ndị a: Betlehem, ndị Netofa, ndị Atrot Bet Joab, ụfọdụ ndị Manaha na ndị Zoa." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ụfọdụ ha bụ ikwu ndị ode akwụkwọ, ndị bi nʼobodo Jabez: ndị Tirait, na ndị Shimea, na ndị Suka. Ndị a niile bụ ndị Ken, ndị sitere nʼagbụrụ Hamat, nna ndị ikwu Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Devid, ndị amụụrụ ya mgbe ọ nọ na Hebrọn. Ọkpara ya bụ Amnọn, nke Ahinoam bụ nwanyị Jezril mụrụ. Nwa ya nke abụọ bụ Daniel, onye nne ya bụ Abigel onye Kamel." 
1Chronicles3:1 Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Devid, ndị amụụrụ ya mgbe ọ nọ na Hebrọn. Ọkpara ya bụ Amnọn, nke Ahinoam bụ nwanyị Jezril mụrụ. Nwa ya nke abụọ bụ Daniel, onye nne ya bụ Abigel onye Kamel." 
1Chronicles3:2 Nke atọ bụ Absalọm, nwa Maaka, nwa nwanyị Talmai, bụ eze Geshua. Nke anọ bụ Adonaịja, nwa nwoke Hagit" 
1Chronicles3:3 Nke ise bụ Shefataya, nwa Abital. Nke isii bụ Itream, nke nwunye ya bụ Egla mụrụ." 
1Chronicles3:4 Ụmụ ndị ikom isii ndị a ka a mụtaara Devid na Hebrọn, ebe ọ nọ chịa dịka eze afọ asaa na ọnwa isii. Devid chịrị na Jerusalem iri afọ atọ na atọ." 
1Chronicles3:5 Ndị a bụkwa ụmụ a mụụrụ ya nʼebe ahụ: Shamua, Shobab, Netan na Solomọn. Mmadụ anọ ndị a bụ ndị Batsheba nwa nwanyị Amiel mụrụ." 
1Chronicles3:6 Ndị ọzọ bụkwa Ibha, Elishua, Elifelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga, Nefeg, Jafia," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishama, Eliada na Elifelet. Ha niile dị itoolu nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ndị a niile bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Devid, na-agụnyeghị ụmụ ndị ikom ndị iko ya nwanyị mụtara. Tama bụ nwanne ha nwanyị." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ndị a bụ ụmụ Solomọn: Rehoboam, na Abija, na Asa, na Jehoshafat," 
1Chronicles3:11 na Joram, na Ahazaya, na Joash," 
1Chronicles3:12 na Amazaya, na Azaraya, na Jotam," 
1Chronicles3:13 na Ehaz, na Hezekaya, na Manase," 
1Chronicles3:14 na Amọn, na Josaya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Ụmụ ndị ikom Josaya: Johanan nwa mbụ ya, na Jehoiakim nwa ya nke abụọ, na Zedekaya nwa ya nke atọ, na Shalum nwa ya nke anọ." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ụmụ Jehoiakim bụ ndị a, Jehoiakin nwa ya, na Zedekaya." 
1Chronicles3:17 Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Jehoiakin, eze ahụ a dọtara nʼagha: Shealtiel, nwa ya," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkiram, Pedaya, Shenaza, Jekamaya, Hoshama na Nedabaya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ụmụ ndị ikom Pedaya bụ Zerubabel na Shimei. Ụmụ ndị ikom Zerubabel bụ ndị a: Meshulam na Hananaya. Shelomit bụ nwanne ha nwanyị. 
1Chronicles3:20 E nwekwara ndị ikom ise ọzọ aha ha bụ Hashuba, Ohel, Berekaya, Hasadaya na Jushab-Hesed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ụmụ Hananaya mụrụ bụ Pelataya na Jeshaya. Jeshaya mụrụ Refaya; Refaya mụrụ Anan na Ọbadaya, Ọbadaya mụrụ Shekanaya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ụmụ Shekanaya bụ ndị a: Shemaya na ụmụ ya ndị ikom: Hatush, Igal, Bariya, Nearaya na Shafat. Ha dị isii nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ụmụ Nearaya bụ ndị a, Elioenai, Hezekaya na Azrikam. Ha dị atọ nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ndị Elioenai mụrụ bụ ndị a: Hodavaya, Eliashib, Pelaya, Akub, Johanan, Delaya na Ananị. Ha niile dị asaa nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ndị ikwu Juda bụ Perez, Hezrọn, Kami, Hua na Shobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobal mụrụ Reaya, onye bụ nna Jahat. Jahat bụ nna Ahumai na Lahad, ndị a bụ ndị ikwu Zorat." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ndị a bụ ụmụ Etam: Jezril, na Ishma, na Idbash, aha nwanne ha nwanyị bụ Hazelelponi." 
1Chronicles4:4 Penuel bụ nna Gedoa, Eza bụ nna Husha. Ndị a bụ ụmụ Hua, bụ ọkpara Efrata, nna Betlehem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashua nna Tekoa lụrụ ndị nwunye abụọ: Hela na Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara mụtaara ya Ahuzam, na Hefa, na Temeni, na Haahashitari. Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ụmụ ndị ikom Hela mụtara bụ Zeret, Zoha, Etnan" 
1Chronicles4:8 na Koz, onye bụ nna Anub na Hazobeba, nakwa nke ikwu Ahahel, nwa Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabez bụ nwoke a na-asọpụrụ karịa ụmụnne ya ndị ikom niile. Nne ya kpọrọ aha ya Jabez, sị, “A mụrụ m ya nʼihe mgbu.”" 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabez tikuru Chineke Izrel mkpu akwa sị ya, “Biko gọzie m, mee ka oke ala m saa mbara. Kwere ka aka gị dịkwasị m, ma wezuga m site nʼihe mmerụ ahụ ọbụla, ka m si otu a gbanarị ihe mgbu.” Chineke zara ekpere ya meere ya ihe ọ rịọrọ." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelub, nwanne nwoke Shua mụrụ Mehia, nna Eshton," 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshton mụrụ Bet-Raafa, na Pasea, na Tihina. Tihina mụrụ Ir Nahash. Ndị a niile bụ ndị ikwu Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ụmụ ndị ikom Kenaz mụtara bụ, Otniel na Seraya. Otniel amụta Hatat na Meonotai." 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonotai bụ nna Ofra. Seraya bụ nna Joab, Joab bụ nna Ge Harashim. A kpọrọ ha Ge Harashim nʼihi na ha bụ ndị ǹka." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kaleb nwa Jefune mụrụ Iru, Elaa na Naam. Ma Elaa mụrụ Kenaz." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ụmụ ndị ikom Jehalelel mụrụ bụ ndị a: Zif, Zifa, Tiria na Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ụmụ Ezra bụ Jeta, Mered, Efaa na Jalon. Otu nʼime ndị nwunye Mered lụrụ mụtara Miriam, Shamai na Ishba, bụ nna Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ụmụ Ezra bụ Jeta, Mered, Efaa na Jalon. Otu nʼime ndị nwunye Mered lụrụ mụtara Miriam, Shamai na Ishba, bụ nna Eshtemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ndị a bụkwa ụmụ ndị ikom Bitaya, bụ nwa nwanyị Fero, nke Mered lụrụ. Nwunye ya nke si nʼebo Juda mụrụ Jered bụ nna Gedoa, Heba nna Soko na Jekutiel nna Zanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ụmụ ndị ikom nwunye Hodia, nwanne nwanyị Naham, bụ nna Keila onye Gam na Eshtemoa onye Maaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ụmụ ndị ikom Shimon mụrụ bụ Amnọn, Rina, Ben-Hanan na Tilon. Ishi mụrụ Zohet na Ben-Zohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ụmụ Shela nwa Juda mụrụ bụ Ịa, nna Leka, Laada, nna Maresha, na ikwu ndị ọrụ ịkpa ezi akwa ọcha nọ na Bet Ashbea" 
1Chronicles4:22 na Jokim, ndị ikom Koziba, na Joash na Saraf, ndị chịrị na Moab na Jashubi Lehem. Aha ndị a sitere nʼakwụkwọ akụkọ mgbe ochie." 
1Chronicles4:23 Ha bụ ndị ọkpụ ite, ndị biri na Netaim ya na Gedera. Ha biri nʼebe ahụ nʼihi ịrụrụ eze ọrụ." 
1Chronicles4:24 Simiọn mụrụ Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Zera na Shaul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaul mụrụ Shalum nna Mibsam. Mibsam bụkwa nna Mishma. 
1Chronicles4:26 Ụmụ Mishma mụrụ bụ Hamuel nwa ya, Zakua nwa ya na Shimei nwa ya." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei mụrụ ndị ikom iri na isii, na ndị inyom isii. Ụmụnne ya ndị ikom enweghị ọtụtụ ụmụ dịka ya onwe ya. Nʼihi ya, ndị ikwu ya adịghị ukwu nʼọnụọgụgụ dịka ndị ọzọ na Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ha biri na Bịasheba, Molada, Haza Shual," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilha, Ezem, Tolad," 
1Chronicles4:30 Betuel, Homa, Ziklag," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet-Makabot, Haza-Susim, Bet-Biri na Shaaraim. Ọ bụ ha bi nʼobodo ndị a niile tutu ruo nʼoge ọchịchị Devid." 
1Chronicles4:32 Obodo gbara ha gburugburu bụ Etam, Ain, Rimọn, Token na Ashan, obodo ise," 
1Chronicles4:33 tinyere obodo nta niile gbara obodo ndị a gburugburu ruo na Baalat. Ndị a bụ ebe obibi ha. Ha nwekwara akwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ. 
1Chronicles4:34 Meshobab, Jamlek, Josha nwa Amazaya," 
1Chronicles4:35 Juel, Jehu nwa Joshibaya, nwa Seraya, nwa Asiel," 
1Chronicles4:36 nakwa Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jeshohaya, Asaya, Adiel, Jesimiel na Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 na Ziza nwa Shifi, nwa Alon, nwa Jedaya, nwa Shimri, nwa Shemaya." 
1Chronicles4:38 Ndị ikom ndị a e depụtara aha ha bụ ndị ndu ikwu ha. Ezinaụlọ ha mụbara nke ukwuu," 
1Chronicles4:39 ha gakwara na mpụta Gedoa nʼakụkụ ọwụwa anyanwụ ndagwurugwu ịchọrọ igwe anụ ụlọ ha ebe ịta nri. 
1Chronicles4:40 Ha chọtara ebe ịta ahịhịa anụ ụlọ mara mma, nke sara mbara, nke dị jụụ, bụrụkwa ebe nsogbu na-adịghị. Ụfọdụ nʼime ụmụ Ham ebiela nʼebe ahụ na mbụ." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ndị ikom ndị a e dere aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ bịara nʼoge Hezekaya na-achị dịka eze Juda. Ha busoro ụmụ Ham agha nʼebe obibi ha, busokwa ndị Meunim bi nʼebe ahụ agha, bibie ha kpamkpam, dịka ọ dị ruo taa. Emesịa ha bichiri ebe ahụ nʼihi na ebe ịta ahịhịa nke igwe anụ ụlọ ha nʼebe ahụ." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ọzọkwa, narị ndị ikom ise nʼime ndị a si nʼebo Simiọn, ndị ndu ha bụ Pelataya, Nearaya, Refaya na Uziel, ụmụ Ishi busoro obodo ugwu ugwu Sia agha." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ha gburu ndị Amalek fọdụrụ ndụ nʼebe ahụ, bichie ala ahụ ruo taa." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ọkpara Izrel bụ Ruben. Ma nʼihi na ọ merụrụ ihe ndina nna ya site na idinakwuru nwunye nna ya, a napụrụ ya ọnọdụ ọkpara ya were ya nye ụmụ nwanne ya Josef mụtara. Nʼihi ya, akwụkwọ akụkọ usoro ọmụmụ ụmụ Izrel akpọghị Ruben ọkpara." 
1Chronicles5:2 Ọ bụ ezie na Juda dị ike karịa ụmụnna ya, bụrụkwa eziokwu na onyendu si na Juda pụta, maọbụ Josef ka e nyere oke ruuru ọkpara." 
1Chronicles5:3 Ruben, ọkpara Izrel mụrụ ndị ikom ndị a: Hanok, na Palu, na Hezrọn, na Kami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Juel mụrụ Shemaya, nna Gog, Gog mụrụ Shimei." 
1Chronicles5:5 Shimei mụrụ Maịka, Maịka amụọ Reaya. Reaya amụọ Baal." 
1Chronicles5:6 Baal mụrụ Beera, onye Tiglat-Pilesa eze ndị Asịrịa dọtara nʼagha. Beera bụkwa onyendu ndị Ruben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ndị ụmụnna ha dịka agbụrụ niile ha si dị, bụ ndị e depụtara aha ha dịka usoro ọmụmụ ha si dị; Jeiel onyeisi, na Zekaraya," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela nwa Azaz nwa Shema, nwa Juel. Ha nwere ebe obibi ha site nʼAroea ruo nʼugwu Nebo, rukwaa Baal-Meon." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ha bụ ndị ọzụzụ atụrụ, nwekwa ọtụtụ igwe anụ ụlọ. Ọ bụkwa nʼakụkụ ọwụwa anyanwụ, nʼọnụ ọzara ruo nʼosimiri Yufretis ka ha na-azụ ha, nʼihi na anụ ụlọ ha nwere bara ụba na Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:10 Nʼoge Sọl bụ eze Izrel, ụmụ Ruben meriri ndị Haga nʼagha, bichie ala ha niile dị nʼọwụwa anyanwụ Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ụmụ Gad bi nʼakụkụ ha site na Bashan ruo Saleka. 
1Chronicles5:12 Juel bụ onyendu na Bashan, Shafam na-esote ya, ya na Janai na Shafat." 
1Chronicles5:13 Ụmụnna ha, ndị bụ ndị ndu ikwu asaa a bụ, Maikel, na Meshulam, na Sheba, na Jorai, na Jakan, na Zia, na Eba." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Abihail, nwa Huri, nwa Jaroa, nwa Gilead, nwa Maikel, nwa Jehishai, nwa Jado, nwa Buz." 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi nwa Abdiel, nwa Guni bụ onyeisi nʼetiti ụmụnna ya." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ndị Gad nwere ebe obibi na Gilead nʼime Bashan, na nʼobodo nta niile gbara ya gburugburu. Ha bikwa nʼebe ahịhịa anụ ụlọ na-ata jupụtara na Sharọn ruo nʼebe oke ala ha kwụsịrị." 
1Chronicles5:17 E denyere aha ndị a niile nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ nʼoge Jotam bụ eze Juda, na nʼoge Jeroboam bụ eze Izrel." 
1Chronicles5:18 Ndị Ruben na ndị Gad, na ọkara ebo Manase nwere iri puku mmadụ anọ na anọ na narị asaa na iri isii (44,760) ndị jikeere ije agha, ndị dị ike, ndị a zụrụ iji ọta na mma agha, na ụta ibu agha." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ha busoro ndị Haga, na Jetua, na Nafish na ndị Nodab agha." 
1Chronicles5:20 E nyeere ha aka ibuso ha agha, Chineke nyefere ndị Haga na ndị niile na-enyere ha aka nʼaka ha, nʼihi na ha kpọkuru ya nʼoge ọgụ ahụ. Ọ zara ekpere ha nʼihi na ha tụkwasịrị ya obi." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ha ji ike chịkọrọ anụ ụlọ ndị Haga, dị iri puku ịnyịnya kamel ise, narị puku atụrụ abụọ na iri puku ise, puku ịnyịnya ibu abụọ. Ha dọkpụkwara narị puku ndị mmadụ nʼagha." 
1Chronicles5:22 E gbukwara ọtụtụ ndị mmadụ nʼihi na agha ahụ bụ nke Chineke lụrụ nʼonwe ya. Ha bichiri ala ahụ tutu ruo mgbe a dọọrọ Izrel niile nʼagha. 
1Chronicles5:23 Ọkara ebo Manase dị ukwuu nʼọnụọgụgụ; ha nwere ebe obibi ha site nʼala Bashan ruo Baal-Hemon, ya bụ, ruo Senia, ugwu Hemon." 
1Chronicles5:24 Ndịisi ikwu ha niile bụ ndị a: Efaa, Ishi, Eliel, Azriel, Jeremaya, Hodavaya na Jadiel. Ndị a niile bụ dimkpa nʼagha, ndị a ma ama na ndịisi ezinaụlọ." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ma ha bụ ndị na-ekwesighị ntụkwasị obi nye Chineke nna nna ha. Kama ha merụrụ onwe ha site nʼife chi niile nke ndị bi nʼala ahụ na mbụ, bụ ndị Chineke lara nʼiyi nʼihu ha." 
1Chronicles5:26 Nʼihi nke a, Chineke nke Izrel kpaliri mmụọ Pul, bụ eze Asịrịa (ya bụ Tiglat-Pilesa eze ndị Asịrịa), ka o bilie megide ndị Ruben, ndị Gad na ọkara ebo Manase, dọta ha nʼagha, buru ha gaa Hala, na Hoboa, na Hara na osimiri Gozan, ebe ha nọ ruo taa." 
1Chronicles6:1 Livayị mụrụ ndị a: Geshọn, Kohat na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kohat mụrụ Amram, Izha, Hebrọn na Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amram mụrụ Erọn, Mosis na Miriam. Erọn mụrụ Nadab, Abihu, Elieza na Itama." 
1Chronicles6:4 Elieza mụrụ Finehaz; Finehaz abụrụ nna Abishua 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishua bụ nna Buki, Buki abụrụ nna Uzi." 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi mụrụ Zerahaya, Zerahaya amụọ Meraiot." 
1Chronicles6:7 Meraiot mụrụ Amaraya, Amaraya amụọ Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitub mụrụ Zadọk, Zadọk amụọ Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaaz mụrụ Azaraya, Azaraya amụọ Johanan." 
1Chronicles6:10 Johanan mụrụ Azaraya ọ bụ ya bụ onye ahụ bụ onye nchụaja ụlọnsọ ukwu ahụ Solomọn wuru na Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaraya mụrụ Amaraya, Amaraya amụọ Ahitub." 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitub mụrụ Zadọk, Zadọk amụọ Shalum." 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalum mụrụ Hilkaya, Hilkaya amụọ Azaraya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaraya mụrụ Seraya, Seraya amụọ Jehozadak," 
1Chronicles6:15 A dọtara Jehozadak nʼagha mgbe Onyenwe anyị mere ka Nebukadneza dọkpụrụ ndị Juda na Jerusalem nʼagha. 
1Chronicles6:16 Ụmụ ndị ikom Livayị bụ, Geshọm, Kohat na Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Geshọm mụrụ Libni na Shimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Ụmụ Kohat bụ Amram, Izha, Hebrọn, na Uziel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Merari mụtara Mahali na Mushi. Ndị a bụ ikwu Livayị ndị e depụtara dịka aha nna ha si dị. 
1Chronicles6:20 Ikwu Geshọm bụ Libni, Jahat, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa, Ido, Zera na Jeaterai." 
1Chronicles6:22 Ikwu Kohat bụ Aminadab, Kora, Asịa," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkena, Ebiasaf, Asịa," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat, Uriel, Ụzaya na Shaul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ụmụ ụmụ Elkena bụ Amasai na Ahimot. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ụmụ ụmụ Ahimot bụ Elkena, Zofai, Nahat," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliab, Jeroham, Elkena na Samuel." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ụmụ Samuel bụ Juel, ọkpara ya, na Abija nke abụọ." 
1Chronicles6:29 Ụmụ ụmụ Merari bụ Mahali, Libni, Shimei, Ụza," 
1Chronicles6:30 Shimea, Hagiya na Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ndị a bụ ndị ikom Devid họpụtara nye ọrụ ilekọta ndị ọbụ abụ nʼụlọ Onyenwe anyị mgbe e bubatara igbe ọgbụgba ndụ nʼebe ahụ. 
1Chronicles6:32 Ha jere ozi ịbụ abụ ha nʼihu ụlọ ikwu, ya bụ, ụlọ nzute, tutu ruo mgbe Solomọn wuchara ụlọnsọ Onyenwe anyị na Jerusalem. Ha jere ozi ha dịka usoro ije ozi ha si dị." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ndị a bụ ndị ikom ahụ jere ozi, ha na ụmụ ha ndị ikom: Site nʼikwu Kohat: Heman, ọbụ abụ. Ndị a bụ nna nna ya ochie: Juel, nwa Samuel," 
1Chronicles6:34 nwa Elkena, nwa Jeroham, nwa Eliel, nwa Toa," 
1Chronicles6:35 nwa Zuf, nwa Elkena, nwa Mahat, nwa Amasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 nwa Elkena, nwa Juel, nwa Azaraya, nwa Zefanaya," 
1Chronicles6:37 nwa Tahat, nwa Asịa, nwa Ebiasaf, nwa Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 nwa Izha, nwa Kohat, nwa Livayị, nwa Izrel." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asaf onye na-enyere Heman aka, na-eje ozi nʼakụkụ aka nri ya. Ndị bụ nna nna ya ochie bụ ndị a: Berekaya, nwa Shimea," 
1Chronicles6:40 nwa Maikel, nwa Baaseya, nwa Malkija," 
1Chronicles6:41 nwa Etni, nwa Zera, nwa Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 nwa Etan, nwa Zima, nwa Shimei," 
1Chronicles6:43 nwa Jahat, nwa Geshọm, nwa Livayị." 
1Chronicles6:44 Onye ọzọ na-enyere Heman aka bụ Etan, onye ikwu Merari. Ọ na-anọ nʼaka ekpe ya. Ndị bụ nna nna ochie Etan bụ ndị a, Kishi, nwa Abdi, nwa Maluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 nwa Hashabaya, nwa Amazaya, nwa Hilkaya," 
1Chronicles6:46 nwa Amzi, nwa Bani, nwa Shema," 
1Chronicles6:47 nwa Mahali, nwa Mushi, nwa Merari, nwa Livayị." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ụmụnna ha ndị Livayị ụfọdụ ka e tinyere nʼọrụ dị iche iche nʼụlọ ikwu, bụ ụlọ Chineke." 
1Chronicles6:49 Ma Erọn na ụmụ ụmụ ya bụ ndị chụrụ aja onyinye nʼelu ebe ịchụ aja nke aja nsure ọkụ, nakwa nʼelu ebe ịchụ aja ihe na-esi isi ụtọ, nke metụtara ọrụ ije ozi niile nʼime Ebe ahụ Kachasị Nsọ, na-ekpuchikwara Izrel mmehie niile ha, nʼusoro dịka ihe niile si dị nke Mosis ohu Chineke nyere nʼiwu." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ụmụ ụmụ Erọn bụ Elieza, na Finehaz, na Abishua," 
1Chronicles6:51 na Buki, na Uzi, na Zerahaya," 
1Chronicles6:52 na Meraiot, na Amaraya, na Ahitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 na Zadọk, na Ahimaaz." 
1Chronicles6:54 Ndị a bụ ala na obodo dị iche iche ụmụ Erọn ketara, nke e nyere ikwu Kohat, ụmụ ụmụ Erọn, nʼihi na ọ bụ ha ka e bu ụzọ kenye oke site nʼife nza." 
1Chronicles6:55 Hebrọn, nʼime Juda, ya na ala ịta nri anụ ụlọ niile dị ya gburugburu." 
1Chronicles6:56 Ma ala ubi na obodo nta niile gbara Hebrọn gburugburu ka e nyere Kaleb nwa Jefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Ya mere e nyere ụmụ ụmụ Erọn Hebrọn (obodo mgbaba), na Libna, na Jatịa, na Eshtemoa," 
1Chronicles6:58 na Hilen, na Debịa," 
1Chronicles6:59 na Ashan, na Juta, na Bet-Shemesh, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha." 
1Chronicles6:60 Site nʼebo Benjamin e nyere ha obodo Gibiọn, Geba, Alemet, na Anatot, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha. Obodo ndị a, nke e kere nʼetiti ndị ikwu Kohat, dị iri na otu nʼọnụọgụgụ." 
1Chronicles6:61 E fere nza tupu e nye ndị fọdụrụ nʼime ikwu Kohat obodo iri site nʼala ọkara ebo Manase. 
1Chronicles6:62 E fekwara nza nye agbụrụ niile dị nʼikwu Geshọm obodo iri na atọ na Bashan, site nʼala ebo Isaka, na Asha, na Naftalị, na agbụrụ niile dị nʼikwu Manase." 
1Chronicles6:63 E fekwara nza nye ikwu Merari obodo iri na abụọ site nʼala ebo Ruben, na Gad, na Zebụlọn." 
1Chronicles6:64 Otu a ka ndị Izrel si nye ndị Livayị obodo ndị a na ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ dị. 
1Chronicles6:65 Site nʼebo Juda, na Simiọn, na Benjamin ka e si kenye ha obodo ndị ahụ a kpọrọ aha ha na mbụ." 
1Chronicles6:66 E sitere nʼala ndị ebo Ifrem kenye ụfọdụ nʼime ndị agbụrụ Kohat obodo ụfọdụ. 
1Chronicles6:67 Nʼala ugwu ugwu Ifrem e kenyere ha Shekem (obodo mgbaba), na Gaza," 
1Chronicles6:68 na Jokmeam, na Bet-Horon," 
1Chronicles6:69 na Aijalon, na, Gat Rimọn, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ gbara ya gburugburu." 
1Chronicles6:70 Site nʼọkara ebo Manase, ndị Izrel nyere ndị ikwu Kohat fọdụrụ obodo ndị a: Anea na Bileam, tinyere ala ebe ịta nri anụ ụlọ ha." 
1Chronicles6:71 Ndị Geshọm natara obodo ndị a: Site nʼagbụrụ ọkara ebo Manase ha natara Golan, nke dị na Bashan, na Ashtarọt, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha." 
1Chronicles6:72 Ebo Isaka nyere ha Kedesh, Daberat," 
1Chronicles6:73 Ramọt na Anem, tinyere ebe ịta nri anụ ụlọ niile dị ha gburugburu." 
1Chronicles6:74 Ebo Asha nyere ha Mashal, Abdon," 
1Chronicles6:75 Hukọk na Rehob, tinyere ebe ịta nri anụ ụlọ niile dị ha gburugburu." 
1Chronicles6:76 Ebo Naftalị nyere ha Kedesh nʼime Galili, Hamọn na Kiriatem, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ndị ebo Zebụlọn nyere ụmụ Merari ndị Livayị fọdụrụ ala ndị a: Jokneam, Kata, Rimọn na Taboa, tinyere ebe ịta nri anụ ụlọ ha." 
1Chronicles6:78 Ma nʼofe osimiri Jọdan, nʼọwụwa anyanwụ obodo Jeriko, ndị ebo Ruben nyere ha obodo Beza dị nʼọzara, nyekwa ha Jahaz," 
1Chronicles6:79 Kedemot na Mefaat, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha niile." 
1Chronicles6:80 Ndị ebo Gad nyere ha Ramọt nke Gilead, Mahanaim," 
1Chronicles6:81 Heshbọn na Jeza, tinyere ebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha niile." 
1Chronicles7:1 Isaka mụrụ ụmụ anọ: Tola, na Pua, na Jashub, na Shịmrọn." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ụmụ Tola ndị ghọrọ ndịisi ezi bụ ndị a: Uzi, na Refaya, na Jeriel, na Jamai, na Ibsam, na Samuel. Nʼoge Devid bụ eze, ọnụọgụgụ ndị agha sitere nʼetiti ha dị iri puku abụọ na abụọ, na narị isii. (22,600)." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi mụrụ Izrahaya. Izrahaya amụta ndị a: Maikel, Ọbadaya, Juel na Ishaya. Ha niile bụkwa ndịisi ikwu ha." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ndị bụ ndị agha nʼetiti ụmụ ụmụ ha nʼoge Devid bụ eze ruru iri puku atọ na isii (36,000), nʼihi na ha niile lụrụ ọtụtụ ndị inyom, mụọ ọtụtụ ụmụ." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ụmụnne ha bụ ndị na-alụ agha bụ ndị agbụrụ Isaka dị iri puku asatọ na asaa (87,000) nʼọnụọgụgụ, dịka e depụtara aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ." 
1Chronicles7:6 Benjamin mụrụ ndị ikom atọ: Bela, Beka na Jediael," 
1Chronicles7:7 Bela mụrụ ụmụ ise: Ezbon, Uzi, Uziel, Jerimot na Iri. Ha niile bụ ndịisi ezi. Ọnụọgụgụ ndị agha ha dị iri puku abụọ na abụọ na iri atọ na anọ (22,034). E dekwara aha ndị a niile nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ụmụ ndị ikom Beka mụrụ bụ Zemira, Joash, Elieza, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremot, Abija, Anatot na Alemet." 
1Chronicles7:9 Akwụkwọ ebe e dere usoro ọmụmụ ha depụtara aha ndịisi ezinaụlọ, na iri puku ndị agha abụọ na narị abụọ (20,200)." 
1Chronicles7:10 Jediael mụrụ otu nwa nwoke: aha ya bụ Bilhan. Ụmụ Bilhan bụ Jeush, Benjamin, Ehud, Kenaana, Zetan, Tashish na Ahishaha." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ụmụ ndị ikom Jediael ndị a bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ. E nwere nʼetiti ha ndị agha ọnụọgụgụ ha dị puku iri na asaa na narị abụọ (17,200), ndị nọ na njikere ibu agha." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ndị Shupim na ndị Hupim bụ ụmụ ụmụ Er ebe ndị Hushim bụ ụmụ ụmụ Aha. 
1Chronicles7:13 Ụmụ Naftalị mụtara bụ Jaziel, Guni, Jeza na Shalum bụ ụmụ Bilha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ụmụ Manase: Asriel, onye iko ya nwanyị bụ onye Aram mụtara, na Makia. Makia bụ nna Gilead." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makia sitere nʼetiti ndị Hupim na Shupim lụọ nwunye. Aha nwanne ya nwanyị bụ Maaka. Otu onye ọzọ si nʼagbụrụ Manase bụ Zelofehad, onye mụtara naanị ụmụ ndị inyom." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka nwunye Makia mụtara otu nwa nwoke ọ gụrụ Peresh. Aha nwanne ya bụ Sheresh, onye mụtara Ụlam na Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Nwa nwoke Ụlam mụtara bụ Bedan. Ndị a bụ ụmụ Gilead, nwa nwa Makia, nwa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamoleket, nwanne nwanyị Makia mụrụ Ishod, Abieza na Mahla." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shemida mụrụ ụmụ ikom ndị a: Ahian, Shekem, Liiki na Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ụmụ Ifrem bụ Shutela, Bered, Tahat, Eleada, Tahat" 
1Chronicles7:21 na Zabad nwa ya, na Shutela nwa ya. Eza na Elead bụ ndị gara ịchịkọrọ anụ ụlọ ndị Gat, ndị ikom nwe obodo ahụ jidere ha gbuo ha nʼebe ahụ." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ifrem nna ha ruru ụjụ nke ukwuu nʼihi ọnwụ ha, ma ụmụnna ya kasịrị ya obi." 
1Chronicles7:23 Mgbe nwunye ya mụrụ nwa nwoke ọzọ, ọ kpọrọ aha ya Beriya, nke pụtara, Ihe ndaba ọjọọ, nʼihi ọnwụ Elead na Eza." 
1Chronicles7:24 Aha nwa Ifrem nke nwanyị bụ Sheera. Sheera bụ onye wuru akụkụ ugwu na ndịda Bet-Horon, wuokwa Uzen-Sheera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ndị a bụkwa ụmụ Ifrem: Refa, nna Reshef, onye bụ nna Tela. Tela bụ nna Tahan," 
1Chronicles7:26 onye bụ nna Ladan, Ladan bụ nna Amihud, onye bụ nna Elishama." 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama bụ nna Nun, onye bụ nna Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishama bụ nna Nun, onye bụ nna Joshua." 
1Chronicles7:28 Betel na obodo ndị ọzọ gbara ya gburugburu, ya bụ Naaran, nʼakụkụ ọwụwa anyanwụ, na Gaza na obodo nta ya, ndị dị nʼọdịda anyanwụ, na Shekem, na obodo ndị ọzọ, tutu ruo Aya, na obodo nta ya niile, so nʼala ha." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ụmụ Manase, nwa Josef, nwa nwa Izrel, bikwa nʼobodo ndị a dị nʼoke ala ha: Bet-Shan, na Teanak, na Megido, na Doa, tinyere obodo nta ha niile." 
1Chronicles7:30 Asha mụrụ ndị a: Imna, Ishva, Ishvi na Beriya. Nwa ya nwanyị bụ Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriya amụta ndị a: Heba na Malkiel, onye bụ nna Biazait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heba bụ onye mụrụ Jaflet, Shoma na Hotam. Nwanne ha nwanyị bụ Shua." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ụmụ Jaflet mụrụ bụ Pasak, Bimhal na Ashvat. Ndị a bụ ụmụ Jaflet." 
1Chronicles7:34 Shoma amụọ Ahi, Roga, Huba na Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Nwanne ya nwoke Helem mụrụ Zofa, Imana, Shelesh na Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Zofa amụta ndị a: Sua, Hanefa, Shual, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Beza, Hod, Shama, Shilsha, Itran na Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Jeta mụtara Jefune, Pispa na Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ụla amụta Ara, Haniel na Rizia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Ụmụ ụmụ Asha ndị a niile bụ ndịisi ezi, ndị a sara anya na mmiri họpụta, ndị bụ dimkpa nʼagha, ndị ndu a ma ama. Ọnụọgụgụ ndị ha tozuru ije agha dị puku iri abụọ na isii (26,000), ndị e depụtara aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benjamin mụtara ụmụ ndị ikom ise. Aha ha nʼusoro dịka e si mụọ ha bụ: Bela nke mbụ, nke abụọ Ashbel, nke atọ Ahara," 
1Chronicles8:2 nke anọ Noha, na nke ise Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ndị ikom Bela mụrụ bụ Aada, Gera, Abihud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishua, Neeman, Ahoa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gera, Shefufan na Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ụmụ Ehud ndị bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ na Geba, ndị bụkwa ndị e si na Geba chụpụ mee ka ha gaa biri na Manahat bụ ndị a:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Neeman, Ahija na Gera, onye chụpụrụ ha na onye bụkwa nna Ụza na Ahihud." 
1Chronicles8:8 A mụtara Shaharaim ụmụ ndị ikom na Moab mgbe ọ gbachara ndị nwunye ya abụọ bụ Hushim na Baara alụkwaghị m. 
1Chronicles8:9 Nwunye ya Hodesh mụtara Jobab, Zibịa, Mesha, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:9 Nwunye ya Hodesh mụtara Jobab, Zibịa, Mesha, Malkam," 
1Chronicles8:10 Jeuz, Sakia na Miama. Ndị a bụ ụmụ ya ndị ikom, ndị bụkwa ndịisi ezi." 
1Chronicles8:11 Tupu ọ chụpụ nwunye ya Hushim, ọ mụtaara ya Abaịtub, na Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpaal mụrụ ndị a: Eba, Misham, Shemed (onye wuru obodo Ono na Lod, na obodo nta gbara ha gburugburu)." 
1Chronicles8:13 Ụmụ ya ndị ọzọ bụ Beriya, na Shema, ndị bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ ndị bi nʼAijalon. Ọ bụ ha chụpụrụ ndị Gat site nʼobodo ahụ." 
1Chronicles8:14 Beriya mụrụ Ahio, Shashak, Jeremot," 
1Chronicles8:15 Zebadaya, Arad, Eda," 
1Chronicles8:16 Maikel, Ishpa na Joha, ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Beriya." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebadaya, Meshulam, Hizki, Heba," 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishmerai, Izlaya na Jobab bụ ụmụ Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:18 Ishmerai, Izlaya na Jobab bụ ụmụ Elpaal." 
1Chronicles8:19 Jakim, Zikri, Zabdi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienai, Ziletai, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaya, Beraya na Shimrat bụ ụmụ Shimei." 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishpan, Eba, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdon, Zikri, Hanan," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hananaya, Elam, Antotija," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ifdeya na Penuel bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Shashak. 
1Chronicles8:26 Jeroham mụrụ Shamsherai, Sheharaya, Atalaya," 
1Chronicles8:27 Jaareshaya, Ịlaịja na Zikri bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Jeroham." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ndị a niile bụ ndịisi ezi, ndị ndu, ndị bi na Jerusalem, ndị e depụtara aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ." 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeiel nna Gibiọn biri na Gibiọn. Aha nwunye ya bụ Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Ọ mụrụ Abdon, ọkpara ya, Zua, Kish, Baal, Nea, Nadab," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedoa, Ahio na Zeka" 
1Chronicles8:32 na Miklot, onye bụ nna Shimea. Ha onwe ha bikwa ndị ụmụnna ha nso na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:33 Nea mụrụ Kish, nna Sọl. Ma Sọl mụrụ Jonatan, Malkishua, Abinadab na Esh-Baal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Jonatan mụrụ nwa nwoke a na-akpọ Merib-Baal, nna Maịka." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ụmụ Maịka mụrụ bụ, Piton, Melek, Tarea na Ehaz." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ehaz amụọ Jehoada nna Alemet, Azmavet na Zimri. Zimri mụrụ Moza." 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza mụrụ Binea, nna Rafa, nna Eleasa, nna Azel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Azel mụrụ ụmụ ndị ikom isii ndị a: Azrikam, Bokeru, Ishmel, Shearaya, Ọbadaya na Hanan. Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Azel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Eshek nwanne nwoke Azel mụrụ ndị ikom atọ: Ụlam, ọkpara ya na Jeush, na Elifelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ụmụ Ụlam bụ dike na dimkpa ndị a zụrụ ịgba ụta. Ọnụọgụgụ ụmụ ha na ụmụ ụmụ ha dị otu narị na iri mmadụ ise, 150. Ha niile sikwa nʼebo Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 E dere usoro ọmụmụ ụmụ Izrel niile nʼime akwụkwọ ndị eze Izrel na Juda. Emesịa, a dọọrọ ha nʼagha buru ha gaa Babilọn nʼihi ekwesighị ntụkwasị obi ha." 
1Chronicles9:2 Nʼime ndị a, ndị bụ ụzọ lọta bịa birikwa nʼihe onwunwe ha nʼobodo nke aka ha bụ ụfọdụ ndị Izrel, na ndị nchụaja, na ndị Livayị, na ndị na-eje ozi nʼụlọnsọ ukwu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ndị si nʼebo Juda, na Benjamin, na Ifrem na Manase lọta bịa biri na Jerusalem bụ ndị a:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai nwa Amihud, nwa Omri, nwa Imri, nwa Bani, onye ikwu Perez, nwa Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Nʼezinaụlọ Shilo: Asaya nwa mbụ ya na ụmụ ya ndị ikom. 
1Chronicles9:6 Ụmụ Zera, Jeuel so nʼime ha. Ọnụọgụgụ ndị Juda niile lọtara dị narị isii na iri itoolu (690)." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ụmụ Benjamin: Salu nwa Meshulam, nwa Hodavaya, nwa Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 na Ibneia nwa Jeroham; Elaa nwa Uzi, nwa Mikri; na Meshulam nwa Shefataya, nwa Reuel, nwa Ibnija." 
1Chronicles9:9 Ha niile bụ ndịisi ezi. Ọnụọgụgụ ndị Benjamin niile lọtara ndị e dere aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ ha, dị narị itoolu na iri ise na isii (956)." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ndị nchụaja: Jedaya, Jehoiarib na Jakin;" 
1Chronicles9:11 Azaraya nwa Hilkaya, nwa Meshulam, nwa Zadọk, na Meraiot, nwa Ahitub. Azaraya bụ onye na-elekọta ụlọnsọ ukwu Chineke." 
1Chronicles9:12 Ndị nchụaja ọzọ lọtaranụ bụ Adaya nwa Jeroham, nwa Pashua, nwa Malkija. Onye ọzọ bụ Maasai nwa Adiel, nwa Jazera, nwa Meshulam nwa Meshilemit, nwa Imea" 
1Chronicles9:13 Ọnụọgụgụ ndị nchụaja lọtaranụ bụ otu puku na narị asaa, na iri isii (1,760). Ha niile bụkwa ndịisi ezinaụlọ, ndị tozuru etozu ịrụ ọrụ ha, ndị ọrụ ha bụ ije ozi nʼụlọnsọ Chineke." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ndị Livayị: Shemaya nwa Hashub, nwa Azrikam, nwa Hashabaya onye ikwu Merari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Bakbaka, Heresh, Galal, na Matanaya nwa Mika, nwa Zikri, nwa Asaf;" 
1Chronicles9:16 Ọbadaya nwa Shemaya, nwa Galal, nwa Jedutun; na Berekaya nwa Asa, nwa Elkena onye biri nʼobodo nta ndị Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ndị nche ọnụ ụzọ ụlọnsọ si nʼebo Livayị: Shalum, onyeisi ha, Akub, Talmon, Ahiman na ụmụnna ha." 
1Chronicles9:18 Ha nọ ruo ugbu a nʼọnụ ụzọ ama Eze, nʼakụkụ ọwụwa anyanwụ. Ha bụ ndị nche ọnụ ụzọ ama si nʼọmụma ụlọ nke ndị Livayị." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalum bụ nwa Kore, na nwa nwa Ebiasaf na Kora. Ya na ụmụnna ya ka ọ bụ ọrụ ha ilekọta ebe a na-eje ozi, na ọnụ ụzọ ụlọnsọ ukwu ahụ dịka nna nna ha lekọtara, cheekwa ụlọ nzute Onyenwe anyị nche." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehaz nwa Elieza bụ onyeisi ndị mbụ rụrụ ọrụ a na mgbe ochie, Onyenwe anyị nọnyekwaara ya." 
1Chronicles9:21 Mgbe ahụ, Zekaraya nwa Meshelemaia bụ onye na-elekọta ọnụ ụzọ e si abata nʼime ụlọ ikwu." 
1Chronicles9:22 Ọnụọgụgụ ndị na-eche ọnụ ụzọ nche nʼoge ahụ bụ narị abụọ na iri na abụọ (212). E depụtara aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ nke obodo nta ha. Ndị nche ọnụ ụzọ ama ndị a bụ ndị Devid na Samuel onye amụma họpụtara nye ha ọnọdụ a nʼihi na-atụkwasịrị ha obi. 
1Chronicles9:23 Ha na ụmụ ụmụ ha ka e tinyere ya nʼaka iche ụlọ nzute Onyenwe anyị nche. 
1Chronicles9:24 Ha na-eche akụkụ anọ ya niile, ọwụwa anyanwụ, ọdịda anyanwụ, ugwu na ndịda." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ụbọchị asaa ka ha na-anọ nʼọrụ a. Emesịa, ụmụnna ha na-abịa gbanwee ha. Ya mere, ha na-agbanwe onwe ha ụbọchị asaa asaa." 
1Chronicles9:26 Ma ndịisi nche ọnụ ụzọ ama anọ ndị ahụ bụ ndị Livayị ka esitere nʼịtụkwasị obi nyefee ọrụ ilekọta ime ụlọ niile nakwa ụlọakụ niile dị nʼime ụlọ Chineke nʼaka. 
1Chronicles9:27 Ha na-eche nche gburugburu ụlọnsọ Chineke abalị niile, nʼihi na ọ bụ ha ka ọ dị nʼaka iche ya nche. Ọ bụkwa ha ka e nyefere ọrụ imeghe ya ụtụtụ niile." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ụfọdụ nʼime ha ka ọ dị nʼaka ilekọta ngwongwo e ji achụ aja. Ha na-agụ ya ọnụ mgbe ọbụla e webatara ya, na mgbe ọbụla a na-ewepụ ya." 
1Chronicles9:29 Ndị ọzọ na-elekọta ihe niile e ji chọọ ụlọnsọ ahụ mma, ya na ụtụ ọka, na mmanya, na ihe nsure ọkụ na-esi isi ụtọ, na ụda dị iche iche." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ma ọ bụ ndị nchụaja ndị ọzọ ka e nyere ọrụ ịsụ, ịgwakọta na ịkpụkọta ụda na ihe nsure ọkụ na-esi isi ụtọ." 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitaia, onye Livayị, ọkpara Shalum, onye ikwu Kora, ka esitere na ntụkwasị obi nyefee ya ọrụ ime achịcha onyinye." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ụfọdụ nʼime ndị ikwu Kohat ka ọ dị nʼaka ime achịcha pụrụ iche, a na-adọkwasị nʼelu tebul, nʼụbọchị izuike niile." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ndị ọbụ abụ, ndị bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ ndị Livayị na-anọgide nʼime ọnụụlọ ndị dị nʼụlọnsọ ukwu nʼihi na e kweghị ka ha rụọ ọrụ ọzọ ebe ọ bụ na ha na-arụ ọrụ ịbụ abụ ehihie na abalị niile." 
1Chronicles9:34 Ha niile bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ nʼebo Livayị. Ndị ndu dịka e depụtakwara aha ha nʼakwụkwọ usoro ọmụmụ. Ha bikwa na Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles9:35 Jeiel nna Gibiọn bụ na Gibiọn ka o bi, Aha nwunye ya bụ Maaka." 
1Chronicles9:36 Ọ mụrụ Abdon, ọkpara ya, Zua, Kish, Baal, Nea, Nadab," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedoa, Ahio, Zekaraya na Miklot." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklot bụ nna Shimeam. Ha onwe ha sokwa ụmụnna ha biri na Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles9:39 Nea mụrụ Kish nna Sọl, onye bụ nna Jonatan, Malkishua, Abinadab na Esh-Baal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Jonatan mụrụ Merib-Baal nna Maịka. 
1Chronicles9:41 Maịka mụrụ Piton, Melek, Tahrea na Ehaz." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ehaz mụrụ Jada. Jada bụ nna Alemet, Azmavet na Zimri. Zimri mụrụ Moza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza mụrụ Binea, nna Refaya, nna Eleasa, nna Azel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Azel mụrụ ụmụ isii: Azrikam, Bokeru, Ishmel, Shearaya, Ọbadaya na Hanan. Ndị a bụ ụmụ ndị ikom Azel." 
1Chronicles10:1 Nʼoge a ndị Filistia lụsoro ndị Izrel agha, ndị Izrel si nʼihu ha gbaa ọsọ, ma ọtụtụ nʼime ha nwụrụ nʼugwu Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ndị Filistia ji ike chụso Sọl na ụmụ ya. Ha gburu ụmụ ya ndị ikom, Jonatan, Abinadab na Malkishua." 
1Chronicles10:3 Agha ahụ siri ike nke ukwuu megide Sọl, mgbe ndị na-agba ụta chụkwutere ya ha merụrụ ya ahụ." 
1Chronicles10:4 Sọl gwara onye na-ebu ngwa agha ya, sị, “Mịpụta mma agha gị, were ya magbuo m ka ndị a a na-ebighị ugwu ghara ịbịa jiri m mee ihe egwuregwu.” Ma onye na-ebu ngwa agha ya ekweghị, nʼihi ọnọdụ oke egwu. Nʼihi ya, Sọl were mma agha nke ya, dakwasị nʼelu ya." 
1Chronicles10:5 Mgbe onye na-ebu ihe agha Sọl hụrụ na ọ nwụọla, ya onwe ya dakwasịkwara nʼelu mma agha nke ya, nwụọkwa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ya mere, Sọl na ụmụ ya ndị ikom atọ nwụrụ, ndị niile si nʼụlọ ya nwụkwara nʼotu mgbe ahụ." 
1Chronicles10:7 Mgbe ndị Izrel niile nọ na ndagwurugwu hụrụ na ndị agha agbaala ọsọ, na Sọl na ụmụ ya ndị ikom anwụọla, ha hapụrụ obodo ha niile gbapụ ọsọ. Ndị Filistia bịakwara bichie nʼime ha." 
1Chronicles10:8 Nʼechi ya, mgbe ndị Filistia bịara iyipụ ndị nwụrụ anwụ ihe ha ga-achịkọrọ, ha hụrụ ozu Sọl na nke ụmụ ya ndị ikom ka ha tọgbọ nʼugwu Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ha yipụrụ ya ihe niile oyi, buru isi ya na ihe agha ya, zipụkwa ndị ozi gara nʼala ndị Filistia niile ikwusa akụkọ ihe mere nye ndị ha niile na arụsị ha niile." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ha tinyere ihe agha ya nʼụlọ chi ha, kwụbakwa okpokoro isi ya nʼụlọ Dagọn." 
1Chronicles10:11 Mgbe ndị Jebesh Gilead niile nụrụ ihe ndị Filistia mere Sọl," 
1Chronicles10:12 ndị ikom ha niile bụ ndị dimkpa, biliri gaa buru ozu Sọl na ụmụ ya, bulata ha na Jebesh. Ha liri ọkpụkpụ ha nʼokpuru osisi ukwu dị na Jebesh, buo ọnụ ụbọchị asaa." 
1Chronicles10:13 Sọl nwụrụ nʼihi ekwesighị ntụkwasị obi ya nye Onyenwe anyị, o debeghị okwu Onyenwe anyị, karịsịa, ọ gara na nke onye na-ajụ mmụọ ọjọọ ase, nʼihi ịjụta ya ase," 
1Chronicles10:14 ma ọ jụghị ase site nʼọnụ Onyenwe anyị. Ọ bụ nke a mere Onyenwe anyị ji gbuo ya, were alaeze ya nyefee Devid nwa Jesi nʼaka." 
1Chronicles11:1 Ndị Izrel niile gbakọtara bịakwute Devid na Hebrọn sị ya, “Lee, ọkpụkpụ gị na anụ ahụ gị ka anyị bụ." 
1Chronicles11:2 Nʼoge gara aga, ọ bụladị mgbe Sọl bụ eze, ọ bụ gị duuru ndị agha Izrel nʼọgụ niile, ma ọpụpụ ma mbata. Onyenwe anyị bụ Chineke gị, sịrị gị, ‘Ị ga-azụ ndị m, bụ Izrel, ị ga-abụkwa onye ga-achị ha.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Mgbe ndị okenye Izrel niile bịakwutere eze Devid na Hebrọn, ya na ha gbara ndụ nʼihu Onyenwe anyị na Hebrọn. Ha tere ya mmanụ ịbụ eze Izrel, dịka Onyenwe anyị kwere na nkwa site nʼọnụ Samuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Devid na ndị Izrel zọọrọ ije garuo Jerusalem nke bụ Jebus. Ma ndị Jebus bi nʼebe ahụ," 
1Chronicles11:5 gwara Devid sị, “Ị gaghị abata nʼebe a.” Nʼagbanyeghị okwu ndị a, Devid dọtara ebe ahụ e wusiri ike nke Zayọn nʼagha, ya bụ obodo Devid." 
1Chronicles11:6 Devid ekwuolarị sị, “Onye ọbụla buru ụzọ buo agha megide ndị Jebus ga-abụ onyeisi ọchịagha ndị agha.” Joab nwa Zeruaya bụ onye mbụ gara, nʼihi ya, o nwetara ike ịbụ ọchịagha." 
1Chronicles11:7 Devid biiri nʼebe ahụ e wusiri ike. Ọ bụ nke a mere e ji akpọ ya obodo Devid. 
1Chronicles11:8 O wuru obodo gburugburu ya, site na Milo ruo na mgbidi gbara ya gburugburu. Ma Joab wuzikwara akụkụ obodo ahụ nke fọdụrụ." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ma Devid gara nʼihu na-adị ukwuu karịa, nʼihi na Onyenwe anyị, Onye pụrụ ime ihe niile, nọnyeere ya." 
1Chronicles11:10 Ndị a bụ ndịisi ndị dike nʼetiti ndị agha Devid. Ha na ndị Izrel niile nyere ịchị eze Devid ezi nkwado ime ka ọchịchị ya ruo nʼakụkụ niile nke ala ahụ, dịka Onyenwe anyị kwere na nkwa." 
1Chronicles11:11 Nke a bụ ndekọ ọnụọgụgụ ndị dike nʼagha Devid nwere: Jashobeam, onye Hakmon, bụ onyeisi nʼetiti ndịisi ndị ọzọ. O weliri ùbe ya megide narị ndị ikom atọ, bụ ndị o gburu nʼotu mgbe ibu agha." 
1Chronicles11:12 Onye nke na-eso ya bụ Elieza nwa Dodayi, onye Ahohi, onye bụ otu nʼime ndị dike atọ ndị ahụ." 
1Chronicles11:13 Ya na Devid nọ na Pas Damin mgbe ndị Filistia zukọrọ nʼebe ahụ ibu agha. Nʼotu ebe, nke e nwere otu ubi jupụtara nʼọka balị, ma ndị agha Izrel si nʼọgbọ agha gbapụ ọsọ nʼihi ndị Filistia." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ma ha were ọnọdụ ha nʼetiti ubi ahụ, ha napụtara ya, tigbuo ndị Filistia niile ahụ. Onyenwe anyị nyere mmeri dị ukwuu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Mmadụ atọ nʼime iri ndịisi agha atọ ahụ jekwuru Devid na nkume dị nʼọgba Adulam, na mgbe otù ndị Filistia mara ụlọ ikwu ha na Ndagwurugwu Refaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ma Devid nọ nʼebe ahụ ewusiri ike nʼoge ahụ, ma ọnọdụ ndị agha ndị Filistia dị na Betlehem." 
1Chronicles11:17 Agụụ mmiri gụrụ Devid nke ukwuu, ọ sị, “Ọ ga-amasị m ma ọ bụrụ na o nwere onye ga-ekunye m mmiri ọṅụṅụ site nʼolulu mmiri dị nso nʼọnụ ụzọ ama Betlehem!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ya mere, ha atọ wakpuru ọmụma ụlọ ikwu ndị Filistia, seta mmiri site nʼolulu mmiri ahụ dị nʼakụkụ ọnụ ụzọ ama Betlehem, bulatara ya Devid. Ma Devid jụrụ ịṅụ ya, kama ọ wufuru ya nʼala dịka onyinye nye Onyenwe anyị, kwuo sị," 
1Chronicles11:19 “Chineke ekwela ka m mee nke a. M ga-aṅụ ọbara ndị ikom a, bụ ndị ji ndụ ha chụọ aja nʼihi ikute mmiri a?” Nʼihi na ha ji ndụ ha chụọ aja ịga kute ya, Devid ekweghị aṅụ ya. Nke a bụ ụdị ike dike atọ ahụ kpara." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishai, nwanne Joab bụ onyeisi ndị ikom atọ ahụ. O weliri ùbe ya megide narị ndị ikom atọ, tigbukwaa ha niile. Nʼihi nke a, ọ ghọrọ onye a ma ama dịka mmadụ atọ ndị a." 
1Chronicles11:21 Nʼetiti mmadụ atọ ahụ, a na-asọpụrụ ya karịa, ọ ghọrọ onyeisi ha. Ọ bụ ezie na-agụnyeghị ya dịka otu onye nʼime ha." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya, nwa Jehoiada, onye si Kabzeel, bụ dike nʼagha, kpara ike dị ukwuu. O tigburu dimkpa abụọ ndị Moab, ndị bụ ọkaka nʼagha. O rịdakwukwara ọdụm nʼime olulu na-amị amị nʼụbọchị mkpụrụ mmiri na-ezo, gbuo ya." 
1Chronicles11:23 O tigburu otu nwoke onye Ijipt, nke ogologo ya dị mita abụọ na ọkara. Ọ bụ ezie na onye Ijipt ahụ ji ùbe buru ezigbo ibu nʼaka, nke okporo ya dịka nke onye na-ekwe akwa ji ekwe akwa, ma Benaya ji naanị mkpọ jekwuru ya, pụnara onye Ijipt ahụ ùbe dị ya nʼaka, jiri ya magbuo ya." 
1Chronicles11:24 Nke a bụ ụdị ike Benaya nwa Jehoiada kpara. Ya onwe ya nwekwara aha dịka ndị dike atọ ahụ. 
1Chronicles11:25 A na-asọpụrụ ya nʼebe ọ dị ukwuu karịa onye ọbụla nʼetiti iri dike atọ ndị ahụ, ma o rughị ogugo ndị dike atọ mbụ ahụ. Devid mere ya onyeisi ndị na-eche ya nche." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ndị bụ dike nʼagha bụ ndị a: Asahel nwanne Joab, Elhanan nwa Dodo onye Betlehem," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamot onye Haroa, Helez onye Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira nwa Ikesh, onye Tekoa, Abieza onye Anatot," 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai onye Husha, Ilai onye Ahohi," 
1Chronicles11:30 Maharai onye Netofa, Heled nwa Baana, onye Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai nwa Ribai, nke Gibea ụmụ Benjamin, Benaya onye Piraton," 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai onye si nʼakụkụ iyi dị na Gaash, Abiel onye Arba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azmavet onye Baharum, Eliaba onye Shaalbon," 
1Chronicles11:34 Ụmụ Hashem onye Gizon, Jonatan nwa Shagee, onye Hara," 
1Chronicles11:35 Ahiam nwa Saka, onye Hara, Elifal nwa Ụọ," 
1Chronicles11:36 Hefa onye Mekerat, Ahija onye Pelon," 
1Chronicles11:37 Hezro onye Kamel, Naarai nwa Ezbai," 
1Chronicles11:38 Juel nwanne Netan, Miba nwa Hagri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Zelek onye Amọn, Naharai onye Beerọt, onye na-ebu ngwa agha Joab, nwa Zeruaya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira onye Itra, Gareb onye Itra," 
1Chronicles11:41 Ụraya onye Het, Zabad nwa Alai," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina nwa Shiza, onye Ruben, onye bụ onyeisi ebo Ruben na iri mmadụ atọ ahụ na-eso ya." 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanan nwa Maaka, Joshafat onye Mitna," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ụzia onye Ashterat, Shama na Jeiel ụmụ Hotam, onye Aroea," 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael nwa Shimri, Joha nwanne ya, onye Tiza," 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel onye Mahavi, Jeribai na Joshavia ụmụ Elnaam, Itma onye Moab," 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel, Obed, na Jaasiel onye Mezoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Ndị a bụ ndị ikom bịakwutere Devid na Ziklag, mgbe e si nʼihu Sọl nwa Kish chụpụ ya. (Ha so nʼime ndị ọka agha nyeere Devid aka ibu agha." 
1Chronicles12:2 Ngwa agha ha bụ ụta, ha nwere ike iji aka nri maọbụ aka ekpe gbapụ àkụ maọbụ fee ebe; ndị a bụ ndị ikwu Sọl si nʼebo Benjamin.)" 
1Chronicles12:3 Onyeisi ha bụ Ahieza na Joash, bụ ụmụ Shema onye Gibea. Ndị ọzọ bụ, Jeziel na Pelet ụmụ Azmavet, Beraka, Jehu onye Anatot," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishmaya onye Gibiọn, dimkpa nʼetiti iri mmadụ atọ ndị ahụ, onye bụ onyendu iri mmadụ atọ ahụ, Jeremaya, Jahaziel, Johanan, Jozabad onye Gedera," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzai, Jerimot, Bealia, Shemaraya, na Shefataya onye Haruf;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkena, Ishaya, Azarel, Joeza na Jashobeam, ndị Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 Juela na Zebadaya ụmụ Jeroham onye Gedoa. 
1Chronicles12:8 Ndị a bụkwa dike nʼagha sitere nʼebo Gad gbasoo Devid nʼebe e wusiri ike ya dị nʼọzara. Ha bụkwa ndị ọka nʼiji ùbe na ọta alụ agha. Ha dịkwa gara gara dịka ele nʼelu ugwu, ihu ha dịkwa ka ihu ọdụm." 
1Chronicles12:9 Eza, bụ onyeisi ha. Ọbadaya bụ onye na-eso ya, tupu Eliab esoro." 
1Chronicles12:10 Onye nke anọ bụ Mishmana. Ndị ọzọ nʼusoro ha bụ, Jeremaya," 
1Chronicles12:11 na Atai bụ nke isii, na Eliel bụ nke asaa," 
1Chronicles12:12 na Johanan bụ nke asatọ, na Elzabad bụ nke itoolu," 
1Chronicles12:13 na Jeremaya onye nke iri, nakwa Makbanai onye nke iri nʼotu." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ndị a, ndị sitere nʼebo Gad bụ ndịisi agha. Onye na-adịghị ike nʼime ha dị ike dịka narị ndị agha, ma onye dị ike nʼime ha dị ike dịka puku ndị agha." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ọ bụ ha gafere osimiri Jọdan nʼudu mmiri, mgbe Jọdan tofere akụkụ ya niile, chụsaa ndị niile bi na ndagwurugwu, nʼakụkụ ọwụwa anyanwụ na ọdịda anyanwụ." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ndị ọzọ sitekwara nʼebo Benjamin na Juda bịakwute Devid nʼebe ya e wusiri ike. 
1Chronicles12:17 Mgbe ahụ, Devid pụrụ ịga zute ha, sị ha, “Ọ bụrụ na unu bịara nʼudo inyere m aka, ejikeere m ịnabata unu ka unu dịnyere m. Kama ọ bụrụkwanụ na unu bịara ịrara m nye nʼaka ndị iro m, ebe aka m dị ọcha, ka Chineke nna nna anyị hụ ihe dị unu nʼobi kpee unu ikpe.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Mgbe ahụ, Mmụọ Nsọ dakwasịrị Amasai, onyendu iri ndị ikom atọ ahụ, mee ka ọ gwa Devid okwu sị ya, “Anyị bụ ndị gị, Devid! Anyị so gị nʼazụ, gị nwa Jesi! Udo, udo ga-abụ nke gị, udo ga-abụkwa nke ndị na-enyere gị aka, nʼihi na Chineke gị na-enyere gị aka.” Ya mere, Devid nabatara ha mee ha ndịisi agha na-apụnara ndị mmadụ ihe." 
1Chronicles12:19 Ụfọdụ nʼime ndị ebo Manase gbasooro Devid, mgbe ọ gara sonyere ndị Filistia nʼịlụso Sọl ọgụ. Ma ya na ndị agha ya enyereghị ndị Filistia aka, nʼihi na mgbe ndị Filistia gbachara izu, ndị ndu ndị Filistia zilagara ya. Ha kwuru sị, “Isi anyị ka anyị ga-atụfu ma ọ bụrụ na Devid ahapụ anyị nʼọgbọ agha gbakwuru nna ya ukwu bụ Sọl.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Mgbe Devid gara Ziklag, ndị a bụ ndị ikom si nʼebo Manase ndị gbasooro ya: Adna, Jozabad, Jediael, Maikel, Jozabad, Elihu na Ziletai. Ndị a niile bụ ndịisi agha na-achị puku ndị agha nʼebo Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ha nyeere Devid aka imegide ndị agha nkwata ahụ, nʼihi na ha niile bụ dike nʼagha, bụrụkwa ndịisi agha." 
1Chronicles12:22 Site nʼụbọchị ruo nʼụbọchị, ọtụtụ ndị ikom na-agbafeta soro Devid, tutu ruo mgbe ha ghọrọ igwe ndị agha, ndị agha nke Chineke." 
1Chronicles12:23 Ndị a bụ ndị jikeere ibu agha, ndị chịkwa ngwa agha bịakwute Devid na Hebrọn, nʼihi na ha chọrọ ka ọ bịa bụrụ eze ha nʼọnọdụ Sọl, dịka Onyenwe anyị kwuru." 
1Chronicles12:24 Ndị sitere nʼebo Juda, ndị bu ọta na ùbe ha dị puku isii na narị asatọ. (6,800)" 
1Chronicles12:25 Ndị Simiọn a maara aha ha nʼibu agha dị puku asaa na otu narị. (7,100)" 
1Chronicles12:26 Ndị Livayị dị puku anọ na narị isii. (4,600)," 
1Chronicles12:27 tinye Jehoiada, onyendu nʼezinaụlọ Erọn na puku ndị ikom atọ na narị asaa (3,700)," 
1Chronicles12:28 na Zadọk, nwokorobịa bụ dike na dimkpa nʼagha, onyendu ndịisi agha iri abụọ na abụọ (22) ndị si nʼezinaụlọ ya." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ụmụ Benjamin, ndị ikwu Sọl, dị puku atọ (3,000), nʼihi na nʼoge a, ọtụtụ ha nọnyeere Sọl." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ụmụ Ifrem dị iri puku abụọ na narị asatọ (20,800), ndị dị ike nʼagha, ndị a makwaara aha ha nʼikwu ha." 
1Chronicles12:31 Site nʼọkara ebo Manase, ndị ọnụọgụgụ ha dị puku iri na asatọ (18,000) ka a họpụtara ịga inyere Devid aka ịbụ eze." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ụmụ Isaka; narị ndịisi abụọ (200), na ndị ha na-edu. Ndịisi a bụ ndị nwere nghọta oge ha nọ nʼime ya marakwa ihe Izrel kwesiri ime nʼoge ahụ." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ụmụ Zebụlọn dị iri puku ise. (50,000) Ha enweghị obi abụọ ọbụla iso Devid. A zụkwara ha nʼiji ụdị ngwa agha ọbụla na-ebu agha." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ọnụọgụgụ ndị ndu ụmụ Naftalị dị otu puku (1,000), tinyere ndị agha dị puku iri atọ na asaa (37,000), ndị ji ùbe na ọta." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ụmụ Dan dị iri puku abụọ na asatọ, na narị isii. (28,600) Ha bụkwa ndị agha jikeere ibu agha." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ụmụ Asha dị iri puku anọ (40,000). Ha bụ ndị ibu agha doro nnọọ anya." 
1Chronicles12:37 Sitekwa nʼọwụwa anyanwụ Jọdan, site nʼebo Ruben na Gad, na ọkara ebo Manase bi, ndị agha ọnụọgụgụ ha dị narị puku na iri abụọ (120,000), ndị ji ụdị ngwa agha ọbụla pụtara soro Devid. Ha bukwa ngwa agha ha pụta." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ndị a niile bụ ndị agha na-eje ozi nʼusoro ndị ji obi ha pụta. Ha nwekwara mkpebi mgbe ha si ebe ọbụla ha si pụta ịbịa Hebrọn ime Devid eze. Ndị Izrel niile jikwa otu obi pụta ime Devid eze Izrel. 
1Chronicles12:39 Mgbe ha pụkwutere Devid, ha so ya rie, ṅụọ, abalị atọ. Ọ bụkwa ihe ndị ezinaụlọ ha kwadoro ha ji bịa ka ha riri." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ndị Isaka, na Zebụlọn, na Naftalị si ebe dị anya bute nri. Ịnyịnya ibu, na ịnyịnya kamel, na ịnyịnya muul na ehi ka ha ji bute nri ndị a. Ọ bụkwa nri dị iche iche ka ha butere, dịka ụtụ ọka, na achịcha e ji mkpụrụ fiig mee, na achịcha ndị ọzọ dị iche, na mmanya, na mmanụ, na igwe ehi, na igwe atụrụ. Ha si otu a bute nri ndị a nʼihi na oke ọṅụ jupụtara nʼala Izrel niile." 
1Chronicles13:1 Devid na ndịisi agha ya na-achị imerime puku ndị agha, na ọtụtụ narị ndị agha, zukọrọ gbaa izu." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ọ gwara ọgbakọ Izrel niile ahụ sị, “Ọ bụrụ na ọ dị unu mma, ọ bụrụkwa na ọ bụ ọchịchọ Onyenwe anyị Chineke anyị, ka anyị ziga ozi zie ụmụnna anyị niile bi nʼakụkụ niile nke ala Izrel, na ndị nchụaja na ndị Livayị niile, bi nʼobodo ha na ndị bi nʼebe ịta nri nke anụ ụlọ ha, ka ha bịa, soro anyị." 
1Chronicles13:3 Ka anyị gaa bulata igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke nʼihi na e lefuru ya anya nʼoge ahụ niile Sọl bụ eze.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Ha niile kwekọrịtara ime nke a nʼihi na okwu ahụ dị ndị niile zukọrọ mma. 
1Chronicles13:5 Mgbe ahụ, Devid kpọrọ ndị Izrel niile oku ka ha zuo ezuo site nʼebe niile ha bi, site nʼoke ala ha na ndị Ijipt, ya bụ iyi Shiho, ruo nʼoke ala dị nʼugwu, ya bụ Lebo Hamat, ka ha gaa bulata igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke site na Kiriat Jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Devid na ndị Izrel niile jere Baala nʼime Juda, ya bụ Kiriat Jearim, i si nʼebe ahụ bugota igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke, bụ Onyenwe anyị, onye na-anọkwasị nʼetiti cherubim, igbe ahụ nke akpọkwasịrị aha ya." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ha ji ụgbọala ọhụrụ ehi na-adọkpụ buru igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke site nʼụlọ Abinadab, Ụza na Ahio na-eduzi ụgbọala ahụ ụzọ." 
1Chronicles13:8 Devid na ndị Izrel niile weere ike ha niile na-aṅụ ọṅụ nʼihu Chineke, jiri abụ, ụbọ akwara, opi, une na ogene na iti egwu na-etekwa egwu." 
1Chronicles13:9 Mgbe ha rutere nʼebe ịzọcha ọka nke Kidon, Ụza setịpụrụ aka ya ijide igbe ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ, nʼihi na ehi ahụ zọhiere ụkwụ." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ma iwe Onyenwe anyị dị ọkụ megide Ụza, o tigburu ya nʼihi na o metụrụ igbe ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ aka. Ya mere, ọ nwụrụ nʼebe ahụ nʼihu Chineke." 
1Chronicles13:11 Mgbe ahụ, iwe were Devid nʼihi ọnụma Onyenwe anyị dakwasịrị Ụza, ruo taa, a na-akpọ ebe ahụ Perez Ụza." 
1Chronicles13:12 Devid tụrụ egwu Chineke nʼụbọchị ahụ, o kwuru sị, “M ga-esi aṅaa bubatara onwe m igbe ọgbụgba ndụ a?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 O bubataghị igbe ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ nʼime obodo Devid, kama o bugara ya nʼụlọ Obed-Edọm, onye Git." 
1Chronicles13:14 Igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke ahụ nọrọ nʼezinaụlọ Obed-Edọm nʼụlọ ya ọnwa atọ. Onyenwe anyị gọzikwara ezinaụlọ ya na ihe niile o nwere. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiram bụ eze Taịa zitere Devid ndị ozi, na ndị ọkwa ǹka osisi na ndị na-edo nkume, ka ha nyere Devid aka iwu ụlọeze ya. O nyekwara ya osisi sida o ji ewu ụlọ ahụ." 
1Chronicles14:2 Devid ghọtara na Onyenwe anyị emeela ka o guzosie ike dịka eze ndị Izrel, na ebuliela alaeze ya elu nke ukwuu nʼihi ndị ya Izrel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Devid lụrụ ndị inyom ọzọ mgbe o jere biri na Jerusalem. Nke a mere ka ọ mụọ ọtụtụ ụmụ nwoke na ụmụ nwanyị. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ndị a bụkwa aha ụmụ a mụụrụ ya nʼebe ahụ: Shamua, Shobab, Netan, Solomọn," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibha, Elishua, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefeg, Jafia," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beeliada na Elifelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Mgbe ndị Filistia nụrụ na eteela Devid mmanụ ị bụ eze ndị Izrel niile, ha pụrụ nʼigwe ha ịchọ ya. Ma Devid nụrụ maka ya, jikere pụọ izute ha." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ma ndị Filistia bịara, bukọrọ ihe niile dị na Ndagwurugwu Refaim." 
1Chronicles14:10 Devid jụrụ Chineke ase sị, “Ọ bụ m gaa buso ndị Filistia agha? Ị ga-enyefe ha nʼaka m?” Onyenwe anyị zara sị ya, “Gaa, aga m enyefe ha nʼaka gị.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Ya mere, Devid na ndị ikom ya gara Baal-Perazim, meriekwa ha nʼebe ahụ. O kwuru sị, “Chineke enupula megide ndị iro m site nʼaka m, dịka idee mmiri si enupu.” Nʼihi ya, a kpọrọ ebe ahụ Baal Perazim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ndị Filistia hapụrụ chi niile ha nʼebe ahụ, Devid nyere iwu ka e suo ha niile ọkụ." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ndị Filistia bukwara agha bịa na ndagwurugwu ahụ ọzọ. 
1Chronicles14:14 Nʼihi nke a, Devid jụrụ Chineke ase ọzọ. Chineke sịrị ya, “Esitekwala nʼihu buso ha agha, kama gbaa ha gburugburu, buso ha agha na ncherita ihu osisi balsam ndị ahụ." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ngwangwa ị nụrụ ụda ikiri ụkwụ nʼelu osisi balsam ndị ahụ, mgbe ahụ ka unu ga-apụ ibu agha, nʼihi na nke a pụtara na Chineke eburula unu ụzọ pụọ, itigbu ndị agha Filistia.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Devid mere dịka Chineke nyere ya nʼiwu. Ha tigburu ndị agha Filistia site na Gibiọn ruo Gaza. 
1Chronicles14:17 Ya mere, aha Devid bidoro na-ewu ewu; Onyenwe anyị tinyekwara ụjọ ya nʼobi mba niile." 
1Chronicles15:1 Mgbe Devid wuchara ụlọ obibi ya nʼobodo Devid, o doziri ebe a ga-adọsa igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke. Ọ mara ụlọ ikwu maka ya." 
1Chronicles15:2 Devid kwuru sị, “O nweghị onye ọbụla ga-ebu igbe Chineke karịakwa ndị Livayị, nʼihi na Onyenwe anyị họpụtara ha ibu igbe Onyenwe anyị na ije ozi nʼihu Onyenwe anyị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Ya mere, Devid kpọkọtara ndị Izrel niile, na Jerusalem ibubata igbe Onyenwe anyị nʼebe ahụ ọ kwadoro na a ga-adọsa ya." 
1Chronicles15:4 Ọ kpọkọtara ụmụ Erọn na ndị Livayị: 
1Chronicles15:5 Ndị Kohat na ụmụnna ha dị otu narị na iri abụọ. (120) Uriel bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:6 Ụmụ Merari na ụmụnna ha dị narị abụọ na iri abụọ. (220) Asaya bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:7 Ụmụ Geshọm na ụmụnna ha dị otu narị na iri atọ. (130) Juel bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:8 Ụmụ Elizafan na ụmụnna ha dị narị abụọ (200). Shemaya bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:9 Ụmụ Hebrọn na ụmụnna ha dị iri asatọ. (80) Eliel bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:10 Ụmụ Uziel na ụmụnna ha dị otu narị na iri na abụọ. (112) Aminadab bụ onyeisi ha. 
1Chronicles15:11 Devid kpọrọ Zadọk na Abịata, ndị nchụaja na Uriel, Asaya, Juel, Shemaya, Eliel, na Aminadab ndị Livayị sị ha," 
1Chronicles15:12 “Unu bụ ndịisi ezinaụlọ dị iche iche, nʼebo Livayị. Doonụ onwe unu nsọ unu na ụmụnna unu ibulata igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị, Chineke Izrel nʼebe a m doziri nʼihi ya." 
1Chronicles15:13 Na mbụ, Onyenwe anyị Chineke tara anyị ahụhụ nʼihi na anyị esoghị omenaala ime ka unu bụ ndị Livayị buru ya. Anyị ajụtaghị ya ase otu a ga-esi bulata ya nʼụzọ o kwesiri.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Ya mere, ndị nchụaja na ndị Livayị mezuru omenaala ido onwe ha nsọ maka ibulata igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị, Chineke Izrel ahụ." 
1Chronicles15:15 Ndị Livayị jiri osisi ogologo buru igbe Chineke ahụ nʼisi ubu aka ha dịka Mosis nyere nʼiwu nʼusoro dịka okwu Onyenwe anyị si dị. 
1Chronicles15:16 Devid nyekwara ndị ndu Livayị iwu sị ka ha họpụta site nʼetiti ụmụnna ha ndị abụ na ndị egwu, ndị ga-abụ abụ ọṅụ, nke ya na ngwa egwu ndị a ga-eso: ụbọ akwara, une na ogene." 
1Chronicles15:17 Ndị Livayị họpụtara Heman nwa Juel; ma site nʼetiti ụmụnna Juel ha họpụtara Asaf, nwa Berekaya. Sitekwa nʼetiti ụmụnna ha ndị Merari ha họpụtara Etan nwa Kushaya," 
1Chronicles15:18 tinyere ndị a, ha họpụtara ụmụnna ha ndị a, ndị na-esote ha nʼọkwa: Zekaraya, Jaaziel, Shemiramot, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Benaya, Maaseia, Matitaia, Elifelehu, Mikneya, Obed-Edọm na Jeiel bụ ndị na-eche ọnụ ụzọ." 
1Chronicles15:19 Heman, Asaf na Etan ka a họpụtara maka ịkụ ogene bronz." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekaraya na Aziel, Shemiramot, Jehiel, Unni, Eliab, Maaseia na Benaya bụ ndị na-akpọ ụbọ akwara dịka usoro abụ alamot, si dị" 
1Chronicles15:21 Matitaia, Elifelehu, Mikneya, Obed-Edọm, Jeiel na Azazaya bụkwa ndị na-akpọ une dịka usoro abụ Sheminit si dị." 
1Chronicles15:22 Onyeisi ndị na-abụ abụ a họpụtara bụ Kenaniya, onye bụkwa onyeisi ndị Livayị. A họpụtara ya nʼihi na ọ bụ onye nwere nghọta banyere abụ." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekaya na Elkena bụ ndị na-eche ọnụ ụzọ ebe igbe ahụ dị. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebanaya, Joshafat, Netanel, Amasai, Zekaraya, Benaya na Elieza, ndị bụ ndị nchụaja bụ ndị na-afụ opi nʼihu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke. Obed-Edọm na Jehaya ga-esokwa ndị ga-eche ọnụ ụzọ ebe igbe ahụ dị nche." 
1Chronicles15:25 Devid na ndị okenye Izrel, na ndịisi agha na-achị puku ndị agha, ji oke ọṅụ gaa nʼụlọ Obed-Edọm nʼihi ibugote igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị ahụ." 
1Chronicles15:26 Nʼihi na Chineke nyeere ndị Livayị na-ebu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị aka, ọ bụ oke ehi asaa na ebule asaa ka a chụrụ nʼaja." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ọ bụ ezi akwa ọcha ka e ji kee Devid ekike, dịka ndị Livayị niile bụ ndị bu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ, na ndị ọbụ abụ, na Kenaniya, bụ onyeisi otu ndị na-abụ abụ yi akwa ọcha nʼahụ ha. Devid yikwa uwe efọọd e ji akwa ọcha dụọ." 
1Chronicles15:28 Ya mere, ndị Izrel niile ji iti mkpu, na-ịfụ opi mpi ebule na-ịfụ opi ike, ịkpọ ụbọ akwara, ịkụ ogene na une, bulata igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị." 
1Chronicles15:29 Mgbe ha bu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị na-abata nʼobodo Devid, Mikal nwa Sọl, lepụrụ anya site na oghereikuku ụlọ. Mgbe ọ hụrụ eze Devid ka ọ na-ayọrị egwu na-aṅụrị ọṅụ, o ledara ya anya nʼime obi ya." 
1Chronicles16:1 Ha bubatara igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke ahụ guzobe ya nʼime ụlọ ikwu nke Devid manyere maka ya. Ha chekwara aja nsure ọkụ na aja udo nʼihu Chineke. 
1Chronicles16:2 Mgbe Devid chụsịrị aja nsure ọkụ na aja udo ndị a, ọ gọziri ndị Izrel nʼaha Onyenwe anyị." 
1Chronicles16:3 O nyekwara onye ọbụla nʼIzrel, ma nwoke ma nwanyị, otu ogbe achịcha, ọkpụrụkpụ anụ na achịcha mkpụrụ osisi a mịkpọrọ amịkpọ." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ọ họpụtara ụfọdụ ndị Livayị ka ha nọdụ nʼihu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị ahụ inye Onyenwe anyị, Chineke Izrel ekele na otuto na ịrịọ ya ngọzị nʼisi ndị ya Izrel. Ndị a bụ ndị o nyere ije ozi a:" 
1Chronicles16:5 Asaf bụ onyeisi ndị a. Ndị ọzọ bụ Zekaraya, Jeiel, Shemiramot, Jehiel, Matitaia, Eliab, Benaya, Obed-Edọm na Jeiel. Ọrụ ha bụ ịkpọ ụbọ akwara, na une, ma ọrụ Asaf bụ onye na-akụ ogene ọla na-ada ụda." 
1Chronicles16:6 Benaya na Jahaziel, ndị nchụaja, ketara ọrụ ịfụ opi nʼihu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Chineke kwamgbe kwamgbe." 
1Chronicles16:7 Nʼụbọchị ahụ ka Devid buru ụzọ họpụta Asaf na ndị otu ya ka ha nye Onyenwe anyị otuto nʼusoro dị otu a: 
1Chronicles16:8 Nyenụ Onyenwe anyị otuto, kwupụtakwa aha ya, meenụ ka amata nʼetiti mba niile banyere ihe niile ọ rụrụ." 
1Chronicles16:9 Bụkuonụ ya abụ, bụkuonụ ya abụ otuto; kwupụtaranụ mba niile ọrụ ebube ya niile." 
1Chronicles16:10 Ṅụrianụ nʼime aha nsọ ya; ka obi ndị niile na-achọ Onyenwe anyị ṅụrịa ọṅụ. 
1Chronicles16:11 Na-achọnụ Onyenwe anyị na ike ya, chọọnụ ihu ya mgbe niile." 
1Chronicles16:12 Chetanụ ọrụ ebube niile nke ọ rụrụ, ihe ịrịbama ya niile na ikpe ziri ezi niile nke si nʼọnụ ya pụta." 
1Chronicles16:13 Unu, ụmụ Izrel, bụ ohu ya ụmụ Jekọb, ndị ọ họpụtara." 
1Chronicles16:14 Ya onwe ya bụ Onyenwe anyị Chineke anyị; ikpe ya dị nʼụwa niile. 
1Chronicles16:15 Ọ na-echeta ọgbụgba ndụ ya ruo mgbe ebighị ebi; bụ nkwa o kwere nye puku ọgbọ. 
1Chronicles16:16 Ọgbụgba ndụ ahụ nke ya na Ebraham gbara, na iyi ọ ṅụrụ nye Aịzik." 
1Chronicles16:17 O mere ka o guzoro nye Jekọb dịka ụkpụrụ, ma nʼebe Izrel nọ dịka ọgbụgba ndụ ebighị ebi:" 
1Chronicles16:18 Sị, “Aga m enye gị ala Kenan ka ọ bụrụ ihe nketa gị.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Mgbe ha dị ole na ole nʼọnụọgụgụ, nʼezie, ole na ole, bụrụkwa ọbịa nʼala ahụ." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ha wagharịrị site nʼotu mba gaa mba ọzọ, sitekwa nʼotu alaeze gaa na alaeze ọzọ." 
1Chronicles16:21 O kweghị ka onye ọbụla mekpaa ha ahụ; ọ baara ndị eze mba nʼihi ha, sị:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Unu emetụkwala ndị m e tere mmanụ aka, unu emekpakwala ndị amụma m ahụ.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Bụkuonụ Onyenwe anyị abụ, unu ụwa niile; kwupụtanụ nzọpụta ya site nʼotu ụbọchị ruo nʼụbọchị nke ọzọ." 
1Chronicles16:24 Kwusaanụ ebube ya nʼetiti mba niile, kọsakwanụ banyere oke ọrụ ya niile nʼetiti ndị niile dị iche iche." 
1Chronicles16:25 Nʼihi na Onyenwe anyị dị ukwuu, ọ bụkwa onye kachasị ka e nye otuto. Onye a na-atụ egwu karịa chi ọzọ niile ka ọ bụkwa." 
1Chronicles16:26 Nʼihi na chi niile nke mba niile dị iche iche bụ arụsị efu, maọbụ Onyenwe anyị kere eluigwe niile." 
1Chronicles16:27 Ịma mma na ebube dị nʼihu ya; ike na ọṅụ dị nʼebe obibi ya. 
1Chronicles16:28 Nyenụ Onyenwe anyị, unu ezinaụlọ nke mba niile dị iche iche, nyenụ Onyenwe anyị nsọpụrụ na ike." 
1Chronicles16:29 E, nyenụ Onyenwe anyị nsọpụrụ ruuru aha ya, werenụ onyinye bịa nʼihu ya. Kpọọnụ isiala nye Onyenwe anyị nʼịma mma nke ịdị nsọ ya." 
1Chronicles16:30 Maa jijiji nʼihu ya, unu ụwa niile. Elu ụwa niile kwụ chịm, a pụghị iwezuga ya nʼọnọdụ ya." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ka eluigwe ṅụrịa, ka ụwa nwekwa obi ụtọ; ka ha kwupụta nʼetiti mba niile sị, “ Onyenwe anyị na-achị.”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Ka osimiri bigbọọ, na ihe niile dị nʼime ya, ka ala ubi niile na ihe niile dị nʼime ha jupụta nʼobi ụtọ." 
1Chronicles16:33 Ka osisi niile nke oke ọhịa bụọ abụ, ka ha bụọ abụ ọṅụ nʼihu Onyenwe anyị, nʼihi na ọ na-abịa ikpe ụwa ikpe." 
1Chronicles16:34 Keleenụ Onyenwe anyị, nʼihi na ọ dị mma, nʼihi na ịhụnanya ya na-adịgide ruo mgbe ebighị ebi." 
1Chronicles16:35 Tikuonụ ya mkpu sị, “Zọpụta anyị, gị Chineke, Onye nzọpụta anyị; chịkọta anyị, ma napụtakwa anyị site nʼaka mba dị iche iche, ka anyị nwee ike nye aha nsọ gị ekele; ma nyaakwa isi nʼime otuto gị.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Otuto dịrị Onyenwe anyị, bụ Chineke nke Izrel, site nʼebighị ebi ruo ebighị ebi. Mgbe ahụ, mmadụ niile sịrị, “Amen” na “Toonu Onyenwe anyị.”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Devid hapụrụ Asaf na ndị Livayị ibe ya nʼihu igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị ahụ ụbọchị niile ije ozi mgbe niile, dịka ọrụ ụbọchị ọbụla si dị." 
1Chronicles16:38 Obed-Edọm nwa Jedutun so nʼime ha, ya na Hosa, na iri mmadụ isii na asatọ ọzọ. Obed-Edọm nwa Jedutun na Hosa bụ ndị na-eche ọnụ ụzọ." 
1Chronicles16:39 Devid nyefekwara Zadọk, onye nchụaja, na ndị nchụaja ibe ya, ọrụ ịnọ nʼihu ụlọ nzute Onyenwe anyị, nʼebe dị elu nke Gibiọn." 
1Chronicles16:40 Nʼihi ịchụ aja nsure ọkụ mgbe niile nʼelu ebe ịchụ aja nke aja nsure ọkụ nye Onyenwe anyị, ụtụtụ na anyasị niile nʼusoro dịka e si dee ya nʼakwụkwọ iwu Onyenwe anyị, nke o nyere ndị Izrel." 
1Chronicles16:41 Devid họpụtakwara Heman, na Jedutun, na ndị ọzọ a kpọrọ aha họpụta inye Onyenwe anyị ekele, “nʼihi ịhụnanya ya na obi ebere ya nke na-adị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.”" 
1Chronicles16:42 Heman na Jedutun bụ ndị ọ dịịrị ịfụ opi, na ịkụ ogene ọla, na ihe egwu ndị ọzọ eji na-enye Chineke otuto. Ụmụ ndị ikom Jedutun bụ ndị nọ nche nʼọnụ ụzọ ama." 
1Chronicles16:43 Mgbe mmemme ahụ gwụsịrị, onye ọbụla lara nʼụlọ ya. Devid lakwara ịgọzi ezinaụlọ ya." 
1Chronicles17:1 Mgbe Devid nọsara ahụ nʼụlọeze ya, ọ sịrị Netan onye amụma, “Lee, mụ onwe m na-ebi nʼụlọ sida, ma igbe ọgbụgba ndụ Onyenwe anyị dị nʼokpuru ụlọ ikwu.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Netan zaghachiri Devid, “Ihe ọbụla dị gị nʼobi, mee ya, nʼihi na Chineke nọnyeere gị.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Ma nʼabalị ahụ, okwu Chineke rutere Netan ntị, na-asị," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Gaa gwa ohu m Devid sị ya, ‘Otu a ka Onyenwe anyị kwuru: Gị onwe gị agaghị ewuru m ụlọ ebe m ga-ebi," 
1Chronicles17:5 nʼihi na ebibeghị m nʼụlọ site nʼụbọchị m si nʼIjipt kpọpụta Izrel ruo taa. Kama e sitela m nʼotu ọmụma ụlọ ikwu baa na nke ọzọ, sitekwa nʼotu ebe obibi gaa ebe nke ọzọ." 
1Chronicles17:6 Nʼebe ọbụla m na-ejegharị nʼetiti ndị Izrel niile, ọ dị mgbe m sịrị onye ọbụla nʼime ndị ndu ha, ndị m nyere iwu ka ha zụọ ndị m, sị, “Gịnị mere unu ewubereghị m ụlọ sida?” ’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Ma ugbu a, gwa Devid bụ ohu m, sị, ‘Otu a ka Onyenwe anyị, Onye pụrụ ime ihe niile kwuru: Mụ onwe m sitere nʼọhịa ebe ịta nri nke ụmụ anụ ụlọ, sikwa nʼebe ị na-azụ igwe ewu na atụrụ kpọpụta gị, mee gị onye na-achị ndị m Izrel." 
1Chronicles17:8 Anọnyekwara m gị nʼebe ọbụla ị gara, kpochapụ ndị iro gị niile site nʼihu gị. Ugbu a, aga m eme ka aha gị dịka aha ndị ikom dịkarịsịrị ukwuu nʼụwa." 
1Chronicles17:9 Aga m ahọpụta otu ebe nʼihi ndị m Izrel, kụkwa ha dịka osisi ka ha biri nʼebe obibi nke aka ha, ka ha ghara ị bụkwa ndị a na-esogbu ọzọ. Ndị ajọ mmadụ agaghị emegbukwa ha dịka ha mere na mbụ," 
1Chronicles17:10 dịka ha na-emekwa siterị na mgbe m họpụtara ndị ndu nye ndị m Izrel. Aga m eme ka ndị iro gị niile nọrọ nʼokpuru gị. “ ‘Ana m ekwupụtara gị na Onyenwe anyị ga-ewuru gị ụlọ. 
1Chronicles17:11 Mgbe ụbọchị gị nʼụwa zuru, mgbe ị gakwuru ndị nna nna gị ha, aga m eme ka otu mkpụrụ gị bilie nọchie ọnọdụ gị, ọ ga-abụ otu nʼime ụmụ ndị ị mụrụ. Aga m emekwa ka alaeze ya guzosie ike." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ọ bụ ya onwe ya ga-ewuru m ụlọ, aga m emekwa ka ocheeze ya guzosie ike ruo mgbe ebighị ebi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mụ onwe m ga-abụrụ ya nna, ya onwe ya ga-abụkwara m nwa. Agaghị m ewezuga ịhụnanya m site nʼebe ọ nọ, dịka m mere onye bu gị ụzọ chịa." 
1Chronicles17:14 Aga m eme ka ọ chịa ụlọ m na nʼalaeze m ruo mgbe ebighị ebi. A ga-emekwa ka ocheeze ya bụrụ ihe guzosiri ike ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.’ ” 
1Chronicles17:15 Netan ziri Devid ozi dịka okwu niile nke ọhụ ahụ si dị. 
1Chronicles17:16 Mgbe ahụ, eze Devid banyere nọdụ ala nʼihu Onyenwe anyị, sị: “Onye ka m bụ, Onyenwe anyị Chineke, gịnịkwa ka ezinaụlọ m bụ, na ị mere ka m bịaruo nʼogogo ha otu a?" 
1Chronicles17:17 O Chineke m, dịka a ga-asị na nke a bụ ihe dị nta nʼanya gị, ugbu a, i kwuola banyere ọdịnihu nke ụlọ ohu gị. Ma gị onwe gị Onyenwe anyị Chineke na-ele m anya dịka a ga-asị na m bụ onye ọnọdụ ya dị elu karịchasịa nke ụmụ mmadụ niile." 
1Chronicles17:18 “Gịnị ọzọ ka Devid ga-agwa gị, nʼihi nsọpụrụ i nyere ohu gị? Nʼihi na ị maara ohu gị nke ọma," 
1Chronicles17:19 O Onyenwe anyị, nʼihi okwu gị na dịka ọchịchọ obi gị si dị, i meela ihe a dị ukwuu, meekwa ka ọ mata nkwa ndị a niile dị ukwuu." 
1Chronicles17:20 “ Onyenwe anyị, ọ dịghị onye dịka gị, ọ dịkwaghị Chineke ọzọ dị ma ọ bụghị gị, dịka anyị nụrụ ya na ntị anyị." 
1Chronicles17:21 Olee ndị dịka ndị gị, bụ Izrel, bụ otu mba nʼelu ụwa ndị Chineke ha gara ịgbapụtara onwe ya ka ọ bụrụ otu ndị, na iji mere onwe gị aha, rụọkwa ọrụ ịtụnanya dị egwu dịkwa ukwuu nʼihi ha, site nʼịchụpụ mba dị iche iche na chi niile ha site nʼihu ndị gị, bụ ndị ị gbapụtara site nʼIjipt?" 
1Chronicles17:22 I mere ka ndị gị Izrel bụrụ ndị nke gị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi. Gị onwe gị kwa, Onyenwe anyị, abụrụla Chineke ha." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Ma ugbu a, Onyenwe anyị, mee ka nkwa a nke i kwere banyere ohu gị na ụlọ ya bụrụ nke ga-eguzosie ike ruo mgbe ebighị ebi. Mezukwaa ihe niile dịka nkwa gị si dị," 
1Chronicles17:24 ka o nwee ike guzosie ike. Ka aha gị bụrụ ihe dị ukwuu ruo mgbe ebighị ebi. Mgbe ahụ ndị mmadụ ga-asị, ‘Onyenwe anyị, Onye pụrụ ime ihe niile, Chineke nke na-achị Izrel, bụ Chineke Izrel.’ A ga-emekwa ka ụlọ ohu gị Devid guzosie ike nʼihu gị." 
1Chronicles17:25 “Gị onwe gị, Chineke m, e kpugheerela ohu gị na ị ga-ewuru ya ụlọ. Ya mere, ohu gị ji nwee obi ike ikpere gị ekpere." 
1Chronicles17:26 Gị onwe gị, Onyenwe anyị, bụ Chineke. I kweekwala ohu gị nkwa ihe ọma ndị a." 
1Chronicles17:27 Ugbu a, ọ masịrị gị ịgọzi ụlọ ohu gị, ime ka ọ dịrị na-aga nʼihu gị ruo mgbe ebighị ebi, nʼihi na gị Onyenwe anyị, agọziela ya. Ọ ga-abụkwa ihe a gọziri agọzi ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Mgbe nke a gasịrị, Devid meriri ndị Filistia, mee ka ha nọdụ nʼokpuru ọchịchị ya. Ọ naara obodo Gat na obodo nta ndị ọzọ gbara ya gburugburu site nʼaka ndị Filistia." 
1Chronicles18:2 Devid merikwara ndị Moab, ha ghọrọ ndị ohu ya, na-ebutakwara ya ụtụ kwa afọ ọbụla." 
1Chronicles18:3 Devid merikwara Hadadeza eze Zoba, na nso Hamat, mgbe ọ na-aga iguzobe ogidi eji mara ya nʼakụkụ osimiri Yufretis." 
1Chronicles18:4 Devid nwudere otu puku ịnyịnya ya na-adọkpụ ụgbọ agha, puku ndị agha asaa ndị na-agba ụgbọ agha, tinyere ndị agha ji ụkwụ eje dị iri puku abụọ. O bipụrụ akwara ụkwụ ịnyịnya ndị ahụ niile ọ dọtara nʼagha, ma hapụ naanị narị ịnyịnya." 
1Chronicles18:5 Mgbe ndị Aram nke Damaskọs bịara inyere Hadadeza eze Zoba aka, Devid gburu iri puku ndị agha abụọ na abụọ nʼime ha." 
1Chronicles18:6 O wuru ogige ndị agha nʼalaeze ndị Aram nke Damaskọs, ndị Aram ghọrọ ndị ohu Devid, na-ewetakwara ya ụtụ ịnata ihuọma. Onyenwe anyị nyere Devid mmeri ebe ọbụla ọ gara." 
1Chronicles18:7 Devid chịkọtara ọta ọlaedo nke ndịisi agha Hadadeza na-ebu na Jerusalem. 
1Chronicles18:8 Site na Tibhat nakwa Kun, bụ obodo ndị Hadadeza na-achị, Devid weere ọtụtụ bronz dị ukwuu, nke Solomọn ji kpụọ Osimiri bronz ahụ, ogidi niile na ngwongwo ndị ọzọ niile nke e ji bronz kpụọ." 
1Chronicles18:9 Mgbe Tou eze Hamat nụrụ na Devid emeriela ndị agha niile nke Hadadeza, eze Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 o zipụrụ Hadoram nwa ya nwoke, ka ọ gaa kelee eze Devid nʼihi mmeri o meriri Hadadeza nʼagha, bụ onye ya na Tou nọ nʼagha. Hadoram ji ọtụtụ akụrụngwa nke ọlaedo, nke ọlaọcha na nke bronz dị iche iche bịa." 
1Chronicles18:11 Eze Devid doro akụrụngwa ndị a niile nsọ nye Onyenwe anyị, dịka o mere ọlaọcha na ọlaedo o wetara na mba ndị a: Edọm, Moab, ndị Amọn, ndị Filistia na Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishai nwa Zeruaya gburu puku ndị Edọm iri na asatọ na Ndagwurugwu Nnu. 
1Chronicles18:13 O wuru ogige ndị agha nʼEdọm, ndị Edọm niile ghọrọ ndị na-ejere Devid ozi. Onyenwe anyị nyere Devid mmeri ebe ọbụla ọ gara." 
1Chronicles18:14 Devid chịrị ndị Izrel niile, na-emere ndị ya ihe dị mma na ihe ziri ezi." 
1Chronicles18:15 Joab nwa Zeruaya bụ onyeisi agha ya; Jehoshafat nwa Ahilud bụ onye na-edekọta akụkọ. 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadọk nwa Ahitub, na Ahimelek nwa Abịata, bụ ndị nchụaja. Shavsha bụ ode akwụkwọ eze." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya nwa Jehoiada bụ onyeisi ndị Keret na Pelet. Ụmụ ndị ikom Devid bụkwa ndịisi nʼọrụ eze. 
1Chronicles19:1 Mgbe ihe ndị a gasịrị, Nahash eze ndị Amọn nwụrụ, nwa ya ghọrọ eze nʼọnọdụ ya." 
1Chronicles19:2 Mgbe ahụ, Devid chere sị, “Aga m egosi Hanọn nwa Nahash obi ebere nʼihi na nna ya gosiri m obi ebere.” Ya mere, Devid zipụrụ ndị ozi ka ha gaa kasịe ya obi nʼihi ọnwụ nna ya. Mgbe ndị ozi Devid bịakwutere Hanọn nʼala ndị Amọn ịkasị ya obi," 
1Chronicles19:3 ndịisi ala Amọn sịrị Hanọn, bụ onyenwe ha, “Ị na-eche na Devid na-akwanyere nna gị ụgwụ site na izite ndị ozi ya ka ha bịa kasịe gị obi? Ọ bụ na ndị ozi ya abịakwuteghị gị, naanị ka ha mee nledo, nyochapụta otu obodo a dị ma kwatuo ya?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Nʼihi nke a, Hanọn jidere ndị ozi Devid nʼike, kpụchapụ ha ajị, bipụkwa uwe mwụda ha nʼetiti ike ha, zilaga ha." 
1Chronicles19:5 Mgbe otu onye bịara zie Devid ihe banyere ndị ikom ahụ, o zipụrụ ndị ozi, ka ha gaa zute ha, nʼihi na e mere ha ihe ihere nʼebe ọ dị ukwuu. Eze sịrị, “Nọdụnụ na Jeriko tutu ruo mgbe afụọnụ unu tolitere, mgbe ahụ unu ga-alọta.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Ma mgbe ndị Amọn chọpụtara na ha abụrụla ihe ịsọ oyi nʼebe Devid nọ, Hanọn na ndị Amọn zipụrụ otu puku talenti ọlaọcha iji gbazite ụgbọ agha na ndị na-agba ụgbọ agha site na Aram Naharaim, na Aram Maaka, nakwa Zoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ha goro ụgbọ agha ọnụọgụgụ ya dị iri puku atọ, na puku abụọ. Ha gokwara eze Maaka na ndị agha ya, ndị bịara maa ụlọ ikwu agha ha na nso Medeba, ebe ndị Amọn sikwa nʼobodo ha niile chịkọta onwe ha pụta ịlụ agha." 
1Chronicles19:8 Mgbe Devid nụrụ nke a, o zipụrụ Joab na ndị agha ya niile bụ dike na dimkpa nʼagha." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ndị Amọn pụtara doo onwe ha nʼusoro ibu agha, nʼọnụ ụzọ ama obodo ha. Ma ndị eze ahụ bịara agha, nọpụrụ onwe ha na mbara ala." 
1Chronicles19:10 Mgbe Joab hụrụ na agha dị megide ya nʼihu na azụ, ọ họpụtara ụfọdụ ndị ọkachamara site nʼetiti ndị agha Izrel, doo ha nʼusoro izute ndị Aram." 
1Chronicles19:11 O tinyere ndị ikom fọdụrụ nʼokpuru ọchịchị Abishai, nwanne ya, e zipụrụ ha izute ndị Amọn nʼagha." 
1Chronicles19:12 Mgbe Abishai na-apụ, Joab gwara ya okwu sị ya, “Ọ bụrụ na ndị Aram esie ike karịa m, mgbe ahụ, ị ga-abịa napụta m. Ọ bụrụkwanụ na ndị Amọn adịrị ike karịa gị, aga m abịa napụta gị." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nwee obi ike, ka anyị lụọ ọgụ a dịka ndị dị ike, nʼihi ndị anyị na obodo niile nke Chineke anyị. Ka Onyenwe anyị meekwa ihe dị mma nʼanya ya.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Mgbe ahụ, Joab na ndị agha so ya bịara nso ibuso ndị Aram agha, ha sitere nʼihu ha gbapụ ọsọ." 
1Chronicles19:15 Mgbe ndị Amọn hụrụ ka ndị Aram na-agbapụ ọsọ, ha onwe ha gbakwaara ọsọ nʼihu Abishai, gbaba nʼime obodo. Ya mere, Joab laghachiri na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ma mgbe ndị Aram hụrụ na ndị Izrel tigburu ha, ha zipụrụ ndị ozi gara kpọta ndị Aram site nʼofe ọzọ nke Osimiri Yufretis. Ọ bụ Shofaka ọchịagha ndị agha Hadadeza na-edu ha." 
1Chronicles19:17 Mgbe a gwara Devid banyere nke a, ọ chịkọtara ndị Izrel niile, pụọ gafee Jọdan. O gara nso imegide ha, o doro usoro agha ya na ncherita ihu ha. Devid doro usoro ndị agha ya izute ndị Aram nʼagha, ha lụsokwara ya agha." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ma ha sitere nʼihu ndị Izrel gbaa ọsọ. Devid gburu puku asaa nʼime ndị ikom na-anya ụgbọ agha, gbukwaa iri puku ndị agha anọ ndị na-eji ụkwụ eje. O gbukwara Shofaka, bụ ọchịagha agha ha." 
1Chronicles19:19 Mgbe ndị eze niile nọ nʼokpuru ọchịchị Hadadeza hụrụ na Izrel etigbuola ha, ha mere ka ha na Devid dịrị nʼudo, bụrụkwa ndị nọ nʼokpuru ya. Ya mere, ndị Aram adịghịkwa njikere inyere ụmụ Amọn aka ọzọ." 
1Chronicles20:1 Nʼoge ọkọchị, mgbe ndị eze na-apụ ibu agha, Joab duuru ndị agha pụọ ibu agha. O bibiri ala ndị Amọn niile, gaa Raba nọchibido ya, ma Devid nọdụrụ na Jerusalem. Joab busoro Raba agha, mee ka ọ ghọọ mkpọmkpọ ebe." 
1Chronicles20:2 Devid kpupuru okpueze nke dị eze ha nʼisi, ahụtara nʼịdị arọ nke okpueze ahụ ruru kilogram ọlaedo iri atọ na anọ, nke e ji nkume ndị dị oke ọnụahịa chọọ mma, e kpunyere ya Devid nʼisi. O sitekwara nʼobodo ahụ kwakọrọ ọtụtụ ihe nkwata nʼagha." 
1Chronicles20:3 Ọ kpọpụtara ndị nọ nʼebe ahụ, manye ha nʼịrụ ọrụ nke e ji mma nkwọ e ji awa osisi, na igwe e ji egwu ala, na anyụike na-arụ. Otu a ka Devid mekwara obodo niile nke ndị Amọn. Emesịa, Devid na ndị agha ya niile laghachiri na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Mgbe oge gatụrụ, agha ọzọ daara ha na ndị Filistia, na Gaza. Mgbe ahụ, Sibekai, onye Husha, gburu Sipai, otu nʼime ndị agbụrụ Refaim. Nke a mere ka ndị Filistia chilie aka ha elu, bụrụ ndị a lụgburu nʼagha." 
1Chronicles20:5 Nʼagha ọzọ ha na ndị Filistia lụrụ, Elhanan, nwa Jaịa, gburu Lami nwanne Golaịat, onye Gat. Onye ùbe ya nwere osisi dị ogologo dịka nke onye na-ekwe akwa ji ekwe akwa." 
1Chronicles20:6 Nʼagha ọzọkwa, bụ nke a lụrụ na Gat, e nwere otu nwoke gbara oke dimkpa, nke nwere mkpịsịaka isii nʼaka ya ọbụla, nweekwa mkpịsịụkwụ isii nʼụkwụ ya ọbụla, ya bụ, a gụkọtaa ha niile, iri mkpịsịaka na mkpịsịụkwụ abụọ na anọ. Ọ bụkwa onye amụrụ nʼagbụrụ Rafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Mgbe ọ kọchara Izrel, Jonatan nwa Shimea, nwanne Devid gburu ya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ndị a bụ ndị agbụrụ Rafa dị na Gat. Devid na ndị agha ya gburu ha niile. 
1Chronicles21:1 Ekwensu biliri megide Izrel, mgbe ọ kpaliri Devid ka ọ gụọ Izrel ọnụ." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ya mere, Devid gwara Joab na ndịisi agha okwu sị, “Gaa gụọ ụmụ Izrel niile ọnụ, site na Bịasheba ruo Dan. Emesịa, bịa gwa m ihe ị gụtara ka m mata ole ọnụọgụgụ ha dị.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Ma Joab zaghachiri, “Ka Onyenwe anyị mee ka ndị agha ya mụbaa, otu onye narị ụzọ karịa. Ma onyenwe m eze, ọ bụ na ndị a niile abụghị ndị nọ nʼokpuru ọchịchị onyenwe m? Nʼihi gịnị ka onyenwe m ji na-achọ ime ihe a? Nʼihi gịnị ka ọ ga-eji wetara Izrel ikpe ọmụma?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ma okwu eze dị ike karịa nke Joab. Ya mere, Joab pụrụ gagharịa nʼIzrel niile, mechaa lọghachikwa na Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Joab nyere Devid ngụkọta ọnụọgụgụ nke ndị agha Izrel niile. NʼIzrel niile, ha dị otu nde, na narị puku ndị ikom ndị tozuru iji mma agha buo agha, tinyekwara narị puku ndị ikom anọ na iri asaa nʼala Juda ndị na-amịpụta mma agha." 
1Chronicles21:6 Ma Joab agụnyeghị ndị Livayị, na ndị Benjamin nʼọnụọgụgụ ahụ, nʼihi na iwu eze amasịghị ya nʼobi nʼụzọ ọbụla." 
1Chronicles21:7 Iwu banyere ọnụọgụgụ a adịghịkwa Chineke mma nʼanya. Ya mere, ọ tara ndị Izrel ahụhụ nʼihi ya." 
1Chronicles21:8 Mgbe ahụ, Devid sịrị Chineke, “Emehiela m nke ukwuu site nʼihe a m mere. Ma ugbu a, biko, arịọ m gị, wezuga ikpe ọmụma dịịrị ohu gị; nʼihi na emeela m ihe nzuzu dị ukwuu.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Onyenwe anyị gwara Gad, onye ọhụ ụzọ Devid, sị," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Gaa gwa Devid, ‘Otu a ka Onyenwe anyị na-ekwu: Ụzọ ihe atọ ka m na-eche gị nʼihu. Họrọ otu nʼime ha nke m ga-eme ka ọ bịakwasị gị.’ ”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Ya mere Gad jekwuuru Devid sị ya, “Ihe a ka Onyenwe anyị kwuru, Họrọ nke dị gị mma." 
1Chronicles21:12 Oke ụnwụ nke ga-adị afọ atọ, ka ọ bụ ọnwa atọ nke mkpochapụ nʼihu ndị iro unu, site na mma agha ha ga-eru unu ahụ, ka ọ bụ ụbọchị atọ nke mma agha Onyenwe anyị, bụ ajọ ọrịa na-efe efe ịda nʼala a, nke mmụọ ozi Onyenwe anyị ga-eme ka ọ bịakwasị ala Izrel niile. Ugbu a, chee echiche, kpebie ọsịsa ị chọrọ ka m weghachiri onye ahụ zitere m.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Devid sịrị Gad, “Anọ m nʼoke nsogbu. Ọ ka mma ka m daba nʼaka Onyenwe anyị karịa ịdaba nʼaka mmadụ. Nʼihi na obi ebere ya bara ụba nke ukwuu.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Nʼihi ya, Onyenwe anyị zitere ajọ ọrịa na-efe efe nʼala Izrel, iri puku ndị ikom asaa dara nwụọ." 
1Chronicles21:15 Chineke zipụrụ mmụọ ozi ị ga bibie Jerusalem, ma dịka mmụọ ozi ahụ na-eme nke a, Onyenwe anyị hụrụ ya, o wutere ya nʼihi mbibi ahụ. Ọ sịrị mmụọ ozi ahụ nke na-ebibi ndị mmadụ, “O zuola! Seghachi aka gị.” Mgbe ahụ, mmụọ ozi Onyenwe anyị na-eguzo nʼebe ịzọcha ọka Arauna onye Jebus." 
1Chronicles21:16 Mgbe Devid leliri anya elu hụ mmụọ ozi Onyenwe anyị ka o guzo nʼetiti mbara eluigwe na ụwa, hụkwa mma agha o ji, nke o chere ihu ya na Jerusalem, ya na ndị okenye Izrel yi akwa mkpe, dara nʼala kpuo ihu nʼala." 
1Chronicles21:17 Devid sịrị Chineke, “Ọ bụghị m nyere iwu ka a gụọ ndị tozuru ibu agha ọnụ? Ọ bụ mụ onwe m, mụ bụ onye ọzụzụ atụrụ, mehiere mee ajọ omume. Ma ndị a bụ naanị ụmụ atụrụ, gịnị kwanụ ka ha mere? Onyenwe anyị Chineke m, biko ekwela ka ọrịa a na-efe efe nọgide nʼahụ ndị gị, ka aka gị dịgide naanị nʼahụ m, dịgidekwa nʼahụ ndị ụlọ m.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Mgbe ahụ, mmụọ ozi Onyenwe anyị nyere Gad iwu ka ọ gwa Devid, ka ọ gaa wuore Onyenwe anyị ebe ịchụ aja nʼebe ịzọcha ọka Arauna, onye Jebus." 
1Chronicles21:19 Ya mere, Devid rubere isi gaa dịka okwu ahụ Gad kwuru nʼaha Onyenwe anyị." 
1Chronicles21:20 Mgbe Arauna nọ nʼebe ịzọcha ọka, ọ tụgharịrị hụ mmụọ ozi ahụ, ụmụ ya ndị ikom anọ ndị so ya guzo nʼebe ahụ zoro onwe ha." 
1Chronicles21:21 Mgbe Devid bịakwutere Arauna, Arauna weliri anya hụ ya, ọ hapụrụ ebe ịzọcha ọka ahụ, bịa kpọọ isiala nye Devid, kpudokwa ihu ya nʼala." 
1Chronicles21:22 Devid sịrị ya, “Nye m ebe a, bụ ala ebe ịzọcha ọka gị, ka m nwee ike wuore Onyenwe anyị ebe ịchụ aja, ka akwụsị ọrịa a na-efe efe dakwasịrị ndị mmadụ. Resi m ya nʼọnụ ahịa o ruru.”"
